changes.title: 内存/local embeddings: 添加 configurable `memorySearch.local.contextSize` 使用 a 4096 default so local embedding contexts can be tuned 为了 constrained hosts 不适用 patching the 内存 host. (#70544) Thanks @aalekh-sarvam.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/local embeddings: add configurable `memorySearch.local.contextSize` with a 4096 default so local embedding contexts can be tuned for constrained hosts without patching the memory host. (#70544) Thanks @aalekh-sarvam.

changes.title: Dependencies/Pi: 更新 bundled Pi packages to `0.70.0`, use Pi's upstream `gpt-5.5` catalog metadata 为了 OpenAI 和 OpenAI Codex, 和 keep only local `gpt-5.5-pro` forward-compat handling.
changes.rawTitle: Dependencies/Pi: update bundled Pi packages to `0.70.0`, use Pi's upstream `gpt-5.5` catalog metadata for OpenAI and OpenAI Codex, and keep only local `gpt-5.5-pro` forward-compat handling.

changes.title: Codex harness: 添加 structured debug logging 为了 embedded harness selection decisions so `/status` stays simple while 网关 logs explain auto-selection 和 Pi fallback reasons. (#70760) Thanks @100yenadmin.
changes.rawTitle: Codex harness: add structured debug logging for embedded harness selection decisions so `/status` stays simple while gateway logs explain auto-selection and Pi fallback reasons. (#70760) Thanks @100yenadmin.

changes.title: Codex harness: route native `request_user_input` prompts back to the originating chat, 保留 queued follow-up answers, 和 honor newer app-server 命令 approval amendment decisions.
changes.rawTitle: Codex harness: route native `request_user_input` prompts back to the originating chat, preserve queued follow-up answers, and honor newer app-server command approval amendment decisions.

changes.title: Codex harness/context-engine: redact context-engine assembly failures 之前 logging, so fallback warnings do not serialize raw 错误 objects. (#70809) Thanks @jalehman.
changes.rawTitle: Codex harness/context-engine: redact context-engine assembly failures before logging, so fallback warnings do not serialize raw error objects. (#70809) Thanks @jalehman.

changes.title: WhatsApp/onboarding: keep first-run setup entry loading off the Baileys runtime dependency 路径, so packaged QuickStart installs can show WhatsApp setup 之前 runtime deps are staged. 修复 #70932.
changes.rawTitle: WhatsApp/onboarding: keep first-run setup entry loading off the Baileys runtime dependency path, so packaged QuickStart installs can show WhatsApp setup before runtime deps are staged. Fixes #70932.

changes.title: Block streaming: suppress final assembled text 之后 partial block-delivery aborts 当 the already-sent text chunks exactly cover the final reply, preventing duplicate replies 不适用 dropping unrelated short messages. 修复 #70921.
changes.rawTitle: Block streaming: suppress final assembled text after partial block-delivery aborts when the already-sent text chunks exactly cover the final reply, preventing duplicate replies without dropping unrelated short messages. Fixes #70921.

changes.title: Codex harness/Windows: 解决 npm-installed `Codex.cmd` shims through PATHEXT 之前 starting the native app-server, so `Codex/*` 模型 work 不适用 a manual `.exe` shim. 修复 #70913.
changes.rawTitle: Codex harness/Windows: resolve npm-installed `codex.cmd` shims through PATHEXT before starting the native app-server, so `codex/*` models work without a manual `.exe` shim. Fixes #70913.

changes.title: Slack/groups: classify MPIM group DMs as group chat context 和 suppress verbose 工具/plan progress 在 Slack non-DM surfaces, so internal "Working…" traces no longer leak 进入 rooms. 修复 #70912.
changes.rawTitle: Slack/groups: classify MPIM group DMs as group chat context and suppress verbose tool/plan progress on Slack non-DM surfaces, so internal "Working…" traces no longer leak into rooms. Fixes #70912.

changes.title: Agent/replay: 停止 OpenAI/Codex transcript replay 从 synthesizing missing 工具 results while still preserving synthetic repair 在 Anthropic, Gemini, 和 Bedrock transport-owned sessions. (#61556) Thanks @VictorJeon 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/replay: stop OpenAI/Codex transcript replay from synthesizing missing tool results while still preserving synthetic repair on Anthropic, Gemini, and Bedrock transport-owned sessions. (#61556) Thanks @VictorJeon and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Agent/WebChat: surface non-retryable provider failures such as billing, 认证, 和 rate-limit errors 从 the embedded runner 而不是 logging `surface_error` 和 leaving webchat 使用 no rendered 错误. 修复 #70124. (#70848) Thanks @truffle-dev.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/WebChat: surface non-retryable provider failures such as billing, auth, and rate-limit errors from the embedded runner instead of logging `surface_error` and leaving webchat with no rendered error. Fixes #70124. (#70848) Thanks @truffle-dev.

changes.title: WhatsApp: unify outbound media normalization across direct sends 和 auto-replies. Thanks @mcaxtr.
changes.rawTitle: WhatsApp: unify outbound media normalization across direct sends and auto-replies. Thanks @mcaxtr.

changes.title: 内存/CLI: declare the built-在 `local` embedding provider 在 the 内存-core manifest, so standalone `openclaw 内存 status`, `index`, 和 `search` can 解决 local embeddings just like the 网关 runtime. 修复 #70836. (#70873) Thanks @mattznojassist.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/CLI: declare the built-in `local` embedding provider in the memory-core manifest, so standalone `openclaw memory status`, `index`, and `search` can resolve local embeddings just like the gateway runtime. Fixes #70836. (#70873) Thanks @mattznojassist.

changes.title: 网关/WebChat: 保留 image attachments 为了 text-only primary 模型 通过 offloading them as media refs 而不是 dropping them, so configured image tools can still inspect the original file. 修复 #68513, #44276, #51656, #70212.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/WebChat: preserve image attachments for text-only primary models by offloading them as media refs instead of dropping them, so configured image tools can still inspect the original file. Fixes #68513, #44276, #51656, #70212.

changes.title: 插件/Google Meet: hang up delegated Twilio calls 在 leave, clean up Chrome realtime audio bridges 当 launch fails, 和 use a flat provider-safe 工具 schema.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/Google Meet: hang up delegated Twilio calls on leave, clean up Chrome realtime audio bridges when launch fails, and use a flat provider-safe tool schema.

changes.title: Media understanding: honor explicit image-模型 configuration 之前 native-vision skips, including `Agent.defaults.imageModel`, `tools.media.image.模型`, 和 provider image defaults such as MiniMax VL 当 the active chat 模型 is text-only. 修复 #47614, #63722, #69171.
changes.rawTitle: Media understanding: honor explicit image-model configuration before native-vision skips, including `agents.defaults.imageModel`, `tools.media.image.models`, and provider image defaults such as MiniMax VL when the active chat model is text-only. Fixes #47614, #63722, #69171.

changes.title: Codex/media understanding: 支持 `Codex/*` image 模型 through bounded Codex app-server image turns, while keeping `OpenAI-Codex/*` 在 the OpenAI Codex OAuth认证 route 和 validating app-server responses against generated protocol contracts. 修复 #70201.
changes.rawTitle: Codex/media understanding: support `codex/*` image models through bounded Codex app-server image turns, while keeping `openai-codex/*` on the OpenAI Codex OAuth route and validating app-server responses against generated protocol contracts. Fixes #70201.

changes.title: Providers/OpenAI Codex: synthesize the `OpenAI-Codex/gpt-5.5` OAuth认证 模型 row 当 Codex catalog discovery omits it, so cron 和 subagent runs do not fail 使用 `Unknown 模型` while the account is authenticated.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/OpenAI Codex: synthesize the `openai-codex/gpt-5.5` OAuth model row when Codex catalog discovery omits it, so cron and subagent runs do not fail with `Unknown model` while the account is authenticated.

changes.title: 模型/Codex: 保留 Codex provider metadata 当 adding 模型 从 chat 或 CLI commands, so manually added Codex 模型 keep the right 认证 和 routing behavior. (#70820) Thanks @Takhoffman.
changes.rawTitle: Models/Codex: preserve Codex provider metadata when adding models from chat or CLI commands, so manually added Codex models keep the right auth and routing behavior. (#70820) Thanks @Takhoffman.

changes.title: Providers/OpenAI: route `OpenAI/gpt-image-2` through configured Codex OAuth认证 directly 当 an `OpenAI-Codex` profile is active, 而不是 probing `OPENAI_API_KEY` first.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/OpenAI: route `openai/gpt-image-2` through configured Codex OAuth directly when an `openai-codex` profile is active, instead of probing `OPENAI_API_KEY` first.

changes.title: Providers/OpenAI: harden image generation 认证 routing 和 Codex OAuth认证 response parsing so fallback only applies to public OpenAI API routes 和 bounded SSE results. Thanks @Takhoffman.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/OpenAI: harden image generation auth routing and Codex OAuth response parsing so fallback only applies to public OpenAI API routes and bounded SSE results. Thanks @Takhoffman.

changes.title: OpenAI/image generation: send reference-image edits as guarded multipart uploads 而不是 JSON data URLs, restoring complex multi-reference `gpt-image-2` edits. 修复 #70642. Thanks @dashhuang.
changes.rawTitle: OpenAI/image generation: send reference-image edits as guarded multipart uploads instead of JSON data URLs, restoring complex multi-reference `gpt-image-2` edits. Fixes #70642. Thanks @dashhuang.

changes.title: Providers/OpenRouter: send image-understanding prompts as user text 之前 image parts, restoring non-empty vision responses 为了 OpenRouter multimodal 模型. 修复 #70410.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/OpenRouter: send image-understanding prompts as user text before image parts, restoring non-empty vision responses for OpenRouter multimodal models. Fixes #70410.

changes.title: Providers/Google: honor the private-network SSRF opt-在 为了 Gemini image generation requests, so trusted 代理 setups that 解决 Google API hosts to private addresses can use `image_generate`. 修复 #67216.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/Google: honor the private-network SSRF opt-in for Gemini image generation requests, so trusted proxy setups that resolve Google API hosts to private addresses can use `image_generate`. Fixes #67216.

changes.title: Agent/transport: 停止 embedded runs 从 lowering the process-wide undici stream timeouts, so slow Gemini image generation 和 other long-running provider requests no longer inherit short run-attempt headers timeouts. 修复 #70423. Thanks @giangthb.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/transport: stop embedded runs from lowering the process-wide undici stream timeouts, so slow Gemini image generation and other long-running provider requests no longer inherit short run-attempt headers timeouts. Fixes #70423. Thanks @giangthb.

changes.title: Providers/OpenAI: honor the private-network SSRF opt-在 为了 OpenAI-compatible image generation endpoints, so trusted LocalAI/LAN `image_generate` routes work 不适用 disabling SSRF checks globally. 修复 #62879. Thanks @seitzbg.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/OpenAI: honor the private-network SSRF opt-in for OpenAI-compatible image generation endpoints, so trusted LocalAI/LAN `image_generate` routes work without disabling SSRF checks globally. Fixes #62879. Thanks @seitzbg.

changes.title: Providers/OpenAI: 停止 advertising the removed `gpt-5.3-Codex-spark` Codex 模型 through fallback catalogs, 和 suppress stale rows 使用 a GPT-5.5 recovery hint.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/OpenAI: stop advertising the removed `gpt-5.3-codex-spark` Codex model through fallback catalogs, and suppress stale rows with a GPT-5.5 recovery hint.

changes.title: Control 界面/chat: persist assistant-generated images as authenticated managed media 和 accept paired-device tokens 为了 assistant media fetches, so webchat history reloads keep showing generated images. (#70719, #70741) Thanks @Patrick-Erichsen.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/chat: persist assistant-generated images as authenticated managed media and accept paired-device tokens for assistant media fetches, so webchat history reloads keep showing generated images. (#70719, #70741) Thanks @Patrick-Erichsen.

changes.title: Control 界面/chat: queue 停止-button aborts across 网关 reconnects so a disconnected active run is canceled 在 reconnect 而不是 only clearing local 界面 state. (#70673) Thanks @chinar-amrutkar.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/chat: queue Stop-button aborts across Gateway reconnects so a disconnected active run is canceled on reconnect instead of only clearing local UI state. (#70673) Thanks @chinar-amrutkar.

changes.title: 内存/QMD: recreate stale managed QMD collections 当 startup repair finds the collection name already exists, so root 内存 narrows back to `内存.md` 而不是 staying 在 broad workspace markdown indexing.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/QMD: recreate stale managed QMD collections when startup repair finds the collection name already exists, so root memory narrows back to `MEMORY.md` instead of staying on broad workspace markdown indexing.

changes.title: Agent/OpenAI: surface selected-模型 capacity failures 从 PI, Codex, 和 auto-reply harness paths 使用 a 模型-switch hint 而不是 the generic empty-response 错误. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/OpenAI: surface selected-model capacity failures from PI, Codex, and auto-reply harness paths with a model-switch hint instead of the generic empty-response error. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/QR: replace legacy `qrcode-terminal` QR rendering 使用 bounded `qrcode-tui` helpers 为了 插件 login/setup flows. (#65969) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/QR: replace legacy `qrcode-terminal` QR rendering with bounded `qrcode-tui` helpers for plugin login/setup flows. (#65969) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 语音-call/realtime: wait 为了 OpenAI session configuration 之前 greeting 或 forwarding buffered audio, 和 reject non-allowlisted Twilio callers 之前 stream setup. (#43501) Thanks @forrestblount.
changes.rawTitle: Voice-call/realtime: wait for OpenAI session configuration before greeting or forwarding buffered audio, and reject non-allowlisted Twilio callers before stream setup. (#43501) Thanks @forrestblount.

changes.title: ACPX/Codex: 停止 materializing `认证.json` bridge files 为了 Codex ACP, Codex app-server, 和 Codex CLI runs; Codex-owned runtimes 现在 use their normal `CODEX_HOME`/`~/.Codex` 认证 路径 directly.
changes.rawTitle: ACPX/Codex: stop materializing `auth.json` bridge files for Codex ACP, Codex app-server, and Codex CLI runs; Codex-owned runtimes now use their normal `CODEX_HOME`/`~/.codex` auth path directly.

changes.title: Auto-reply/system events: route async exec-event completion replies through the persisted session delivery context, so long-running 命令 results return to the originating channel 而不是 being dropped 当 live origin metadata is missing. (#70258) Thanks @wzfukui.
changes.rawTitle: Auto-reply/system events: route async exec-event completion replies through the persisted session delivery context, so long-running command results return to the originating channel instead of being dropped when live origin metadata is missing. (#70258) Thanks @wzfukui.

changes.title: 网关/sessions: extend the webchat session-mutation guard to `sessions.compact` 和 `sessions.compaction.restore`, so `WEBCHAT_UI` clients are rejected 从 compaction-side session mutations consistently 使用 the existing patch/delete guards. (#70716) Thanks @drobison00.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/sessions: extend the webchat session-mutation guard to `sessions.compact` and `sessions.compaction.restore`, so `WEBCHAT_UI` clients are rejected from compaction-side session mutations consistently with the existing patch/delete guards. (#70716) Thanks @drobison00.

changes.title: QA channel/安全: reject non-HTTP(S) inbound attachment URLs 之前 media fetch, 和 log rejected schemes so suspicious 或 misconfigured payloads are visible 期间 debugging. (#70708) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: QA channel/security: reject non-HTTP(S) inbound attachment URLs before media fetch, and log rejected schemes so suspicious or misconfigured payloads are visible during debugging. (#70708) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/install: link the host OpenClaw package 进入 external 插件 that declare `openclaw` as a peer dependency, so peer-only 插件 SDK imports 解决 之后 install 不适用 bundling a duplicate host package. (#70462) Thanks @anishesg.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/install: link the host OpenClaw package into external plugins that declare `openclaw` as a peer dependency, so peer-only plugin SDK imports resolve after install without bundling a duplicate host package. (#70462) Thanks @anishesg.

changes.title: 插件/Windows: refresh the packaged 插件 SDK alias 在 place 期间 bundled runtime dependency repair, so 网关 和 CLI 插件 startup no longer race 在 `ENOTEMPTY`/`EPERM` 之后 same-guest npm updates.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/Windows: refresh the packaged plugin SDK alias in place during bundled runtime dependency repair, so gateway and CLI plugin startup no longer race on `ENOTEMPTY`/`EPERM` after same-guest npm updates.

changes.title: Teams/安全: require shared Bot Framework audience tokens to name the configured Teams app via verified `appid` 或 `azp`, blocking cross-bot 令牌 replay 在 the global audience. (#70724) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Teams/security: require shared Bot Framework audience tokens to name the configured Teams app via verified `appid` or `azp`, blocking cross-bot token replay on the global audience. (#70724) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/startup: 解决 bundled 插件 Jiti loads relative to the target 插件 module 而不是 the central loader, so Bun global installs no longer hang while discovering bundled image providers. (#70073) Thanks @yidianyiko.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/startup: resolve bundled plugin Jiti loads relative to the target plugin module instead of the central loader, so Bun global installs no longer hang while discovering bundled image providers. (#70073) Thanks @yidianyiko.

changes.title: Anthropic/CLI 安全: derive Claude CLI `bypassPermissions` 从 OpenClaw's existing YOLO exec policy, 保留 explicit raw Claude `--permission-mode` overrides, 和 strip malformed permission-mode args 而不是 静默地 falling back to a bypass. (#70723) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Anthropic/CLI security: derive Claude CLI `bypassPermissions` from OpenClaw's existing YOLO exec policy, preserve explicit raw Claude `--permission-mode` overrides, and strip malformed permission-mode args instead of silently falling back to a bypass. (#70723) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Android/安全: require loopback-only cleartext 网关 connections 在 Android manual 和 scanned routes, so private-LAN 和 link-local `ws://` endpoints 现在 fail closed unless TLS is enabled. (#70722) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Android/security: require loopback-only cleartext gateway connections on Android manual and scanned routes, so private-LAN and link-local `ws://` endpoints now fail closed unless TLS is enabled. (#70722) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Pairing/安全: require private-IP 或 loopback hosts 为了 cleartext mobile pairing, 和 停止 treating `.local` 或 dotless hostnames as safe cleartext endpoints. (#70721) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Pairing/security: require private-IP or loopback hosts for cleartext mobile pairing, and stop treating `.local` or dotless hostnames as safe cleartext endpoints. (#70721) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/安全: 停止 setup-API lookup 从 falling back to the launch directory, so workspace-local `extensions/<插件>/setup-API.*` files cannot be executed 期间 provider setup resolution. (#70718) Thanks @drobison00.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/security: stop setup-api lookup from falling back to the launch directory, so workspace-local `extensions/<plugin>/setup-api.*` files cannot be executed during provider setup resolution. (#70718) Thanks @drobison00.

changes.title: Approvals/安全: require explicit chat exec-approval enablement 而不是 auto-enabling approval clients just because approvers 解决 从 配置 或 owner allowlists. (#70715) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Approvals/security: require explicit chat exec-approval enablement instead of auto-enabling approval clients just because approvers resolve from config or owner allowlists. (#70715) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Discord/安全: keep native slash-命令 channel policy 从 bypassing configured owner 或 member restrictions, while preserving channel-policy fallback 当 no stricter access rule exists. (#70711) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Discord/security: keep native slash-command channel policy from bypassing configured owner or member restrictions, while preserving channel-policy fallback when no stricter access rule exists. (#70711) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Android/安全: 停止 `ASK_OPENCLAW` intents 从 auto-sending injected prompts, so external app actions only prefill the draft 而不是 dispatching it immediately. (#70714) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Android/security: stop `ASK_OPENCLAW` intents from auto-sending injected prompts, so external app actions only prefill the draft instead of dispatching it immediately. (#70714) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Secrets/Windows: strip UTF-8 BOMs 从 file-backed secrets 和 keep unavailable ACL checks fail-closed unless trusted file 或 exec providers explicitly opt 进入 `allowInsecurePath`. (#70662) Thanks @zhanggpcsu.
changes.rawTitle: Secrets/Windows: strip UTF-8 BOMs from file-backed secrets and keep unavailable ACL checks fail-closed unless trusted file or exec providers explicitly opt into `allowInsecurePath`. (#70662) Thanks @zhanggpcsu.

changes.title: Agent/image generation: escape ignored override values 在 工具 warnings so parsed `MEDIA:` directives cannot be injected through unsupported 模型 options. (#70710) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/image generation: escape ignored override values in tool warnings so parsed `MEDIA:` directives cannot be injected through unsupported model options. (#70710) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: QQBot/安全: require framework 认证 为了 `/bot-approve` so unauthorized QQ senders cannot 更改 exec approval settings through the unauthenticated pre-dispatch slash-命令 路径. (#70706) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: QQBot/security: require framework auth for `/bot-approve` so unauthorized QQ senders cannot change exec approval settings through the unauthenticated pre-dispatch slash-command path. (#70706) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: MCP协议/tools: 停止 the ACPX OpenClaw tools bridge 从 listing 或 invoking owner-only tools such as `cron`, closing a privilege-escalation 路径 为了 non-owner MCP协议 callers. (#70698) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: MCP/tools: stop the ACPX OpenClaw tools bridge from listing or invoking owner-only tools such as `cron`, closing a privilege-escalation path for non-owner MCP callers. (#70698) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 飞书/onboarding: load 飞书 setup surfaces through a setup-only barrel so first-run setup no longer imports 飞书's Lark SDK 之前 bundled runtime deps are staged. (#70339) Thanks @andrejtr.
changes.rawTitle: Feishu/onboarding: load Feishu setup surfaces through a setup-only barrel so first-run setup no longer imports Feishu's Lark SDK before bundled runtime deps are staged. (#70339) Thanks @andrejtr.

changes.title: Approvals/startup: let native approval handlers report ready 之后 网关 认证 while replaying pending approvals 在 the background, so slow 或 failing replay delivery no longer blocks handler startup 或 amplifies reconnect storms.
changes.rawTitle: Approvals/startup: let native approval handlers report ready after gateway authentication while replaying pending approvals in the background, so slow or failing replay delivery no longer blocks handler startup or amplifies reconnect storms.

changes.title: WhatsApp/安全: keep contact/vCard/location structured-object free text out 的 the inline message body 和 render it through fenced untrusted metadata JSON, limiting hidden prompt-injection payloads 在 names, phone fields, 和 location labels/comments.
changes.rawTitle: WhatsApp/security: keep contact/vCard/location structured-object free text out of the inline message body and render it through fenced untrusted metadata JSON, limiting hidden prompt-injection payloads in names, phone fields, and location labels/comments.

changes.title: Group-chat/安全: keep channel-sourced group names 和 participant labels out 的 inline group system prompts 和 render them through fenced untrusted metadata JSON.
changes.rawTitle: Group-chat/security: keep channel-sourced group names and participant labels out of inline group system prompts and render them through fenced untrusted metadata JSON.

changes.title: Agent/replay: 保留 Kimi-style `functions.<name>:<index>` 工具-call IDs 期间 strict replay sanitization so custom OpenAI-compatible Kimi routes keep multi-turn 工具 use intact. (#70693) Thanks @geri4.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/replay: preserve Kimi-style `functions.<name>:<index>` tool-call IDs during strict replay sanitization so custom OpenAI-compatible Kimi routes keep multi-turn tool use intact. (#70693) Thanks @geri4.

changes.title: Discord/replies: 保留 final reply permission context through outbound delivery so Discord replies keep the same channel/member routing rules at send time.
changes.rawTitle: Discord/replies: preserve final reply permission context through outbound delivery so Discord replies keep the same channel/member routing rules at send time.

changes.title: 插件/startup: restore bundled 插件 `openclaw/插件-sdk/*` resolution 从 packaged installs 和 external runtime-deps stage roots, so Telegram/Discord no longer 崩溃-loop 使用 `Cannot find package 'openclaw'` 之后 missing dependency repair. (#70852) Thanks @simonemacario.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/startup: restore bundled plugin `openclaw/plugin-sdk/*` resolution from packaged installs and external runtime-deps stage roots, so Telegram/Discord no longer crash-loop with `Cannot find package 'openclaw'` after missing dependency repair. (#70852) Thanks @simonemacario.

changes.title: CLI/Claude: run the same prompt-build hooks 和 trigger/channel context 在 `claude-CLI` turns as 在 direct embedded runs, keeping Claude Code sessions aligned 使用 OpenClaw workspace identity, routing, 和 hook-driven prompt mutations. (#70625) Thanks @mbelinky.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/Claude: run the same prompt-build hooks and trigger/channel context on `claude-cli` turns as on direct embedded runs, keeping Claude Code sessions aligned with OpenClaw workspace identity, routing, and hook-driven prompt mutations. (#70625) Thanks @mbelinky.

changes.title: Discord/插件 startup: keep subagent hooks lazy behind Discord's channel entry so packaged entry imports stay narrow 和 report import failures 使用 the channel id 和 entry 路径.
changes.rawTitle: Discord/plugin startup: keep subagent hooks lazy behind Discord's channel entry so packaged entry imports stay narrow and report import failures with the channel id and entry path.

changes.title: 内存/诊断工具: keep root durable 内存 canonicalized 在 `内存.md`, 停止 treating lowercase `内存.md` as a runtime fallback, 和 let `openclaw 诊断工具 --修复` merge true split-brain root files 进入 `内存.md` 使用 a backup. (#70621) Thanks @mbelinky.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/doctor: keep root durable memory canonicalized on `MEMORY.md`, stop treating lowercase `memory.md` as a runtime fallback, and let `openclaw doctor --fix` merge true split-brain root files into `MEMORY.md` with a backup. (#70621) Thanks @mbelinky.

changes.title: Providers/Anthropic Vertex: restore ADC-backed 模型 discovery 之后 the lightweight provider-discovery 路径 通过 resolving emitted discovery entries, exposing synthetic 认证 在 bootstrap discovery, 和 honoring copied env snapshots 当 probing the default GCP ADC 路径. 修复 #65715. (#65716) Thanks @feiskyer.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/Anthropic Vertex: restore ADC-backed model discovery after the lightweight provider-discovery path by resolving emitted discovery entries, exposing synthetic auth on bootstrap discovery, and honoring copied env snapshots when probing the default GCP ADC path. Fixes #65715. (#65716) Thanks @feiskyer.

changes.title: Codex harness/status: pin embedded harness selection per session, show active non-PI harness ids such as `Codex` 在 `/status`, 和 keep legacy transcripts 在 PI until `/new` 或 `/reset` so 配置 changes cannot hot-switch existing sessions.
changes.rawTitle: Codex harness/status: pin embedded harness selection per session, show active non-PI harness ids such as `codex` in `/status`, and keep legacy transcripts on PI until `/new` or `/reset` so config changes cannot hot-switch existing sessions.

changes.title: 网关/安全: fail closed 在 Agent-driven `网关 配置.apply`/`配置.patch` runtime edits 通过 allowlisting a narrow set 的 Agent-tunable prompt, 模型, 和 mention-gating paths (including Telegram topic-level `requireMention`) 而不是 relying 在 a hand-maintained denylist 的 protected subtrees that could miss new sensitive 配置 keys. (#70726) Thanks @drobison00.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/security: fail closed on agent-driven `gateway config.apply`/`config.patch` runtime edits by allowlisting a narrow set of agent-tunable prompt, model, and mention-gating paths (including Telegram topic-level `requireMention`) instead of relying on a hand-maintained denylist of protected subtrees that could miss new sensitive config keys. (#70726) Thanks @drobison00.

changes.title: Webhooks/安全: re-解决 `SecretRef`-backed Webhook route secrets 在 each request so `openclaw secrets reload` revokes the previous secret immediately 而不是 waiting 为了 a 网关 restart. (#70727) Thanks @drobison00.
changes.rawTitle: Webhooks/security: re-resolve `SecretRef`-backed webhook route secrets on each request so `openclaw secrets reload` revokes the previous secret immediately instead of waiting for a gateway restart. (#70727) Thanks @drobison00.

items.title: Codex harness/Windows: 解决 npm-installed `Codex.cmd` shims through PATHEXT 之前 starting the native app-server, so `Codex/*` 模型 work 不适用 a manual `.exe` shim. 修复 #70913.

items.title: 插件/QR: replace legacy `qrcode-terminal` QR rendering 使用 bounded `qrcode-tui` helpers 为了 插件 login/setup flows. (#65969) Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Plugins/QR: replace legacy `qrcode-terminal` QR rendering with bounded `qrcode-tui` helpers for plugin login/setup flows. (#65969) Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: 插件/install: link the host OpenClaw package 进入 external 插件 that declare `openclaw` as a peer dependency, so peer-only 插件 SDK imports 解决 之后 install 不适用 bundling a duplicate host package. (#70462) Thanks @anishesg.
items.rawTitle: Plugins/install: link the host OpenClaw package into external plugins that declare `openclaw` as a peer dependency, so peer-only plugin SDK imports resolve after install without bundling a duplicate host package. (#70462) Thanks @anishesg.

items.title: 插件/Windows: refresh the packaged 插件 SDK alias 在 place 期间 bundled runtime dependency repair, so 网关 和 CLI 插件 startup no longer race 在 `ENOTEMPTY`/`EPERM` 之后 same-guest npm updates.
items.rawTitle: Plugins/Windows: refresh the packaged plugin SDK alias in place during bundled runtime dependency repair, so gateway and CLI plugin startup no longer race on `ENOTEMPTY`/`EPERM` after same-guest npm updates.

items.title: 插件/startup: 解决 bundled 插件 Jiti loads relative to the target 插件 module 而不是 the central loader, so Bun global installs no longer hang while discovering bundled image providers. (#70073) Thanks @yidianyiko.
items.rawTitle: Plugins/startup: resolve bundled plugin Jiti loads relative to the target plugin module instead of the central loader, so Bun global installs no longer hang while discovering bundled image providers. (#70073) Thanks @yidianyiko.

items.title: 插件/安全: 停止 setup-API lookup 从 falling back to the launch directory, so workspace-local `extensions/<插件>/setup-API.*` files cannot be executed 期间 provider setup resolution. (#70718) Thanks @drobison00.
items.rawTitle: Plugins/security: stop setup-api lookup from falling back to the launch directory, so workspace-local `extensions/<plugin>/setup-api.*` files cannot be executed during provider setup resolution. (#70718) Thanks @drobison00.

items.title: 插件/Google Meet: hang up delegated Twilio calls 在 leave, clean up Chrome realtime audio bridges 当 launch fails, 和 use a flat provider-safe 工具 schema.
items.rawTitle: Plugins/Google Meet: hang up delegated Twilio calls on leave, clean up Chrome realtime audio bridges when launch fails, and use a flat provider-safe tool schema.

items.title: MCP协议/tools: 停止 the ACPX OpenClaw tools bridge 从 listing 或 invoking owner-only tools such as `cron`, closing a privilege-escalation 路径 为了 non-owner MCP协议 callers. (#70698) Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: MCP/tools: stop the ACPX OpenClaw tools bridge from listing or invoking owner-only tools such as `cron`, closing a privilege-escalation path for non-owner MCP callers. (#70698) Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: Providers/Google: honor the private-network SSRF opt-在 为了 Gemini image generation requests, so trusted 代理 setups that 解决 Google API hosts to private addresses can use `image_generate`. 修复 #67216.
items.rawTitle: Providers/Google: honor the private-network SSRF opt-in for Gemini image generation requests, so trusted proxy setups that resolve Google API hosts to private addresses can use `image_generate`. Fixes #67216.

items.title: 内存/QMD: recreate stale managed QMD collections 当 startup repair finds the collection name already exists, so root 内存 narrows back to `内存.md` 而不是 staying 在 broad workspace markdown indexing.
items.rawTitle: Memory/QMD: recreate stale managed QMD collections when startup repair finds the collection name already exists, so root memory narrows back to `MEMORY.md` instead of staying on broad workspace markdown indexing.

items.title: Pairing/安全: require private-IP 或 loopback hosts 为了 cleartext mobile pairing, 和 停止 treating `.local` 或 dotless hostnames as safe cleartext endpoints. (#70721) Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Pairing/security: require private-IP or loopback hosts for cleartext mobile pairing, and stop treating `.local` or dotless hostnames as safe cleartext endpoints. (#70721) Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: QQBot/安全: require framework 认证 为了 `/bot-approve` so unauthorized QQ senders cannot 更改 exec approval settings through the unauthenticated pre-dispatch slash-命令 路径. (#70706) Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: QQBot/security: require framework auth for `/bot-approve` so unauthorized QQ senders cannot change exec approval settings through the unauthenticated pre-dispatch slash-command path. (#70706) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Providers/xAI: 添加 image generation, text-to-speech, 和 speech-to-text 支持, including `grok-imagine-image` / `grok-imagine-image-pro`, reference-image edits, six live xAI voices, MP3/WAV/PCM/G.711 TTS formats, `grok-stt` audio transcription, 和 xAI realtime transcription 为了 语音 Call streaming. (#68694) Thanks @KateWilkins.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/xAI: add image generation, text-to-speech, and speech-to-text support, including `grok-imagine-image` / `grok-imagine-image-pro`, reference-image edits, six live xAI voices, MP3/WAV/PCM/G.711 TTS formats, `grok-stt` audio transcription, and xAI realtime transcription for Voice Call streaming. (#68694) Thanks @KateWilkins.

changes.title: Providers/STT: 添加 语音 Call streaming transcription 为了 Deepgram, ElevenLabs, 和 Mistral, alongside the existing OpenAI 和 xAI realtime STT paths; ElevenLabs also gains Scribe v2 batch audio transcription 为了 inbound media.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/STT: add Voice Call streaming transcription for Deepgram, ElevenLabs, and Mistral, alongside the existing OpenAI and xAI realtime STT paths; ElevenLabs also gains Scribe v2 batch audio transcription for inbound media.

changes.title: TUI: 添加 local embedded mode 为了 running terminal chats 不适用 a 网关 while keeping 插件 approval gates enforced. (#66767) Thanks @fuller-stack-dev.
changes.rawTitle: TUI: add local embedded mode for running terminal chats without a Gateway while keeping plugin approval gates enforced. (#66767) Thanks @fuller-stack-dev.

changes.title: Onboarding: auto-install missing provider 和 channel 插件 期间 setup so first-run configuration can complete 不适用 manual 插件 recovery.
changes.rawTitle: Onboarding: auto-install missing provider and channel plugins during setup so first-run configuration can complete without manual plugin recovery.

changes.title: OpenAI/Responses: use OpenAI's native `web_search` 工具 automatically 为了 direct OpenAI Responses 模型 当 web search is enabled 和 no managed search provider is pinned; explicit providers such as Brave keep the managed `web_search` 工具.
changes.rawTitle: OpenAI/Responses: use OpenAI's native `web_search` tool automatically for direct OpenAI Responses models when web search is enabled and no managed search provider is pinned; explicit providers such as Brave keep the managed `web_search` tool.

changes.title: 模型/commands: 添加 `/模型 添加 <provider> <modelId>` so you can register a 模型 从 chat 和 use it 不适用 restarting the 网关; keep `/模型` as a simple provider 浏览器 while adding clearer 添加 guidance 和 copy-friendly 命令 examples. (#70211) Thanks @Takhoffman.
changes.rawTitle: Models/commands: add `/models add <provider> <modelId>` so you can register a model from chat and use it without restarting the gateway; keep `/models` as a simple provider browser while adding clearer add guidance and copy-friendly command examples. (#70211) Thanks @Takhoffman.

changes.title: WhatsApp: 添加 configurable native reply quoting 使用 replyToMode 为了 WhatsApp conversations. Thanks @mcaxtr.
changes.rawTitle: WhatsApp: add configurable native reply quoting with replyToMode for WhatsApp conversations. Thanks @mcaxtr.

changes.title: WhatsApp/groups+direct: forward per-group 和 per-direct `systemPrompt` 配置 进入 inbound context `GroupSystemPrompt` so configured per-chat behavioral instructions are injected 在 every turn. Supports `"*"` wildcard fallback 和 account-scoped overrides under `channels.WhatsApp.accounts.<id>.{groups,direct}`; account maps fully replace root maps (no deep merge), matching the existing `requireMention` pattern. Closes #7011. (#59553) Thanks @Bluetegu.
changes.rawTitle: WhatsApp/groups+direct: forward per-group and per-direct `systemPrompt` config into inbound context `GroupSystemPrompt` so configured per-chat behavioral instructions are injected on every turn. Supports `"*"` wildcard fallback and account-scoped overrides under `channels.whatsapp.accounts.<id>.{groups,direct}`; account maps fully replace root maps (no deep merge), matching the existing `requireMention` pattern. Closes #7011. (#59553) Thanks @Bluetegu.

changes.title: Agent/sessions: 添加 mailbox-style `sessions_list` filters 为了 label, Agent, 和 search plus visibility-scoped derived title 和 last-message previews. (#69839) Thanks @dangoZhang.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/sessions: add mailbox-style `sessions_list` filters for label, agent, and search plus visibility-scoped derived title and last-message previews. (#69839) Thanks @dangoZhang.

changes.title: Control 界面/settings+chat: 添加 a 浏览器-local personal identity 为了 the operator (name plus local-safe avatar), route user identity rendering through the shared chat/avatar 路径 used 通过 assistant 和 Agent surfaces, 和 tighten Quick Settings, Agent fallback chips, 和 narrow-screen chat layouts so personalization no longer wastes space 或 clips controls. (#70362) Thanks @BunsDev.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/settings+chat: add a browser-local personal identity for the operator (name plus local-safe avatar), route user identity rendering through the shared chat/avatar path used by assistant and agent surfaces, and tighten Quick Settings, agent fallback chips, and narrow-screen chat layouts so personalization no longer wastes space or clips controls. (#70362) Thanks @BunsDev.

changes.title: 网关/diagnostics: 启用 payload-free stability recording 通过 default 和 添加 a 支持-ready diagnostics export 使用 sanitized logs, status, health, 配置, 和 stability snapshots 为了 bug reports. (#70324) Thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/diagnostics: enable payload-free stability recording by default and add a support-ready diagnostics export with sanitized logs, status, health, config, and stability snapshots for bug reports. (#70324) Thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: Providers/Tencent: 添加 the bundled Tencent Cloud provider 插件 使用 TokenHub onboarding, docs, `hy3-preview` 模型 catalog entries, 和 tiered Hy3 pricing metadata. (#68460) Thanks @JuniperSling.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/Tencent: add the bundled Tencent Cloud provider plugin with TokenHub onboarding, docs, `hy3-preview` model catalog entries, and tiered Hy3 pricing metadata. (#68460) Thanks @JuniperSling.

changes.title: Providers/Amazon Bedrock Mantle: 添加 Claude Opus 4.7 through Mantle's Anthropic Messages route 使用 provider-owned bearer-认证 streaming, so the 模型 is actually callable 不适用 treating AWS bearer tokens like Anthropic API keys. Thanks @wirjo.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/Amazon Bedrock Mantle: add Claude Opus 4.7 through Mantle's Anthropic Messages route with provider-owned bearer-auth streaming, so the model is actually callable without treating AWS bearer tokens like Anthropic API keys. Thanks @wirjo.

changes.title: Providers/GPT-5: move the GPT-5 prompt overlay 进入 the shared provider runtime so compatible GPT-5 模型 receive the same behavior 和 heartbeat guidance through OpenAI, OpenRouter, OpenCode, Codex, 和 other GPT providers; 添加 `Agent.defaults.promptOverlays.gpt5.personality` as the global friendly-style toggle while keeping the OpenAI 插件 设置 as a fallback.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/GPT-5: move the GPT-5 prompt overlay into the shared provider runtime so compatible GPT-5 models receive the same behavior and heartbeat guidance through OpenAI, OpenRouter, OpenCode, Codex, and other GPT providers; add `agents.defaults.promptOverlays.gpt5.personality` as the global friendly-style toggle while keeping the OpenAI plugin setting as a fallback.

changes.title: Providers/OpenAI Codex: 移除 the Codex CLI 认证 import 路径 从 onboarding 和 provider discovery so OpenClaw no longer copies `~/.Codex` OAuth认证 material 进入 Agent 认证 stores; use 浏览器 login 或 device pairing instead. (#70390) Thanks @pashpashpash.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/OpenAI Codex: remove the Codex CLI auth import path from onboarding and provider discovery so OpenClaw no longer copies `~/.codex` OAuth material into agent auth stores; use browser login or device pairing instead. (#70390) Thanks @pashpashpash.

changes.title: CLI/Claude: default `claude-CLI` runs to warm stdio sessions, including custom configs that omit transport fields, 和 resume 从 the stored Claude session 之后 网关 restarts 或 idle exits. (#69679) Thanks @obviyus.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/Claude: default `claude-cli` runs to warm stdio sessions, including custom configs that omit transport fields, and resume from the stored Claude session after Gateway restarts or idle exits. (#69679) Thanks @obviyus.

changes.title: Pi/模型: 更新 the bundled pi packages to `0.68.1` 和 let the OpenCode Go catalog come 从 pi 而不是 插件-maintained 模型 aliases, adding the refreshed `opencode-go/kimi-k2.6`, Qwen, GLM, MiMo, 和 MiniMax entries.
changes.rawTitle: Pi/models: update the bundled pi packages to `0.68.1` and let the OpenCode Go catalog come from pi instead of plugin-maintained model aliases, adding the refreshed `opencode-go/kimi-k2.6`, Qwen, GLM, MiMo, and MiniMax entries.

changes.title: Tokenjuice: 添加 bundled native OpenClaw 支持 为了 tokenjuice as an opt-在 插件 that compacts noisy `exec` 和 `bash` 工具 results 在 Pi embedded runs. (#69946) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Tokenjuice: add bundled native OpenClaw support for tokenjuice as an opt-in plugin that compacts noisy `exec` and `bash` tool results in Pi embedded runs. (#69946) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: ACPX: 添加 an explicit `openClawToolsMcpBridge` 选项 that injects a core OpenClaw MCP协议 server 为了 selected built-在 tools, starting 使用 `cron`.
changes.rawTitle: ACPX: add an explicit `openClawToolsMcpBridge` option that injects a core OpenClaw MCP server for selected built-in tools, starting with `cron`.

changes.title: CLI/诊断工具 插件: lazy-load 诊断工具 插件 paths 和 prefer installed 插件 `dist/*` runtime entries over source-adjacent JavaScript fallbacks, reducing the measured `诊断工具 --non-interactive` runtime 通过 about 74% while keeping cold 诊断工具 startup 在 built 插件 artifacts. (#69840) Thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/doctor plugins: lazy-load doctor plugin paths and prefer installed plugin `dist/*` runtime entries over source-adjacent JavaScript fallbacks, reducing the measured `doctor --non-interactive` runtime by about 74% while keeping cold doctor startup on built plugin artifacts. (#69840) Thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: CLI/debugging: 添加 an opt-在 temporary debug timing helper 为了 local CLI 性能 investigations, 使用 readable stderr output, JSONL capture, 和 docs 为了 removing probes 之前 landing 修复. (#70469) Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/debugging: add an opt-in temporary debug timing helper for local CLI performance investigations, with readable stderr output, JSONL capture, and docs for removing probes before landing fixes. (#70469) Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: Docs/i18n: 添加 Thai translation 支持 为了 the docs site.
changes.rawTitle: Docs/i18n: add Thai translation support for the docs site.

changes.title: Providers/OpenAI-compatible: mark known local backends such as vLLM, SGLang, llama.cpp, LM Studio, LocalAI, Jan, TabbyAPI, 和 text-generation-webui as streaming-usage compatible, so their 令牌 accounting no longer degrades to unknown/stale totals. (#68711) Thanks @gaineyllc.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/OpenAI-compatible: mark known local backends such as vLLM, SGLang, llama.cpp, LM Studio, LocalAI, Jan, TabbyAPI, and text-generation-webui as streaming-usage compatible, so their token accounting no longer degrades to unknown/stale totals. (#68711) Thanks @gaineyllc.

changes.title: Providers/OpenAI-compatible: recover streamed 令牌 usage 从 llama.cpp-style `timings.prompt_n` / `timings.predicted_n` metadata 和 sanitize usage counts 之前 accumulation, fixing unknown 或 stale totals 当 compatible servers do not emit an OpenAI-shaped `usage` object. (#41056) Thanks @xaeon2026.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/OpenAI-compatible: recover streamed token usage from llama.cpp-style `timings.prompt_n` / `timings.predicted_n` metadata and sanitize usage counts before accumulation, fixing unknown or stale totals when compatible servers do not emit an OpenAI-shaped `usage` object. (#41056) Thanks @xaeon2026.

changes.title: 插件/startup: prefer native Jiti loading 为了 built bundled 插件 dist modules 在 supported runtimes, cutting measured bundled 插件 load time 通过 82-90% while keeping source TypeScript 在 the transform 路径. (#69925) Thanks @aauren.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/startup: prefer native Jiti loading for built bundled plugin dist modules on supported runtimes, cutting measured bundled plugin load time by 82-90% while keeping source TypeScript on the transform path. (#69925) Thanks @aauren.

changes.title: 插件 SDK/STT: share realtime transcription WebSocket transport 和 multipart batch transcription form helpers across bundled STT providers, reducing provider 插件 boilerplate while preserving 代理 capture, reconnects, audio queueing, close flushing, upload filename normalization, 和 ready handshakes.
changes.rawTitle: Plugin SDK/STT: share realtime transcription WebSocket transport and multipart batch transcription form helpers across bundled STT providers, reducing provider plugin boilerplate while preserving proxy capture, reconnects, audio queueing, close flushing, upload filename normalization, and ready handshakes.

changes.title: 插件 SDK/Pi embedded runs: 添加 a bundled-插件 embedded extension factory seam so native 插件 can extend Pi embedded runs 使用 async runtime hooks such as `tool_result` handling 而不是 falling back to the older synchronous persistence 路径. (#69946) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugin SDK/Pi embedded runs: add a bundled-plugin embedded extension factory seam so native plugins can extend Pi embedded runs with async runtime hooks such as `tool_result` handling instead of falling back to the older synchronous persistence path. (#69946) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Codex harness/hooks: route native Codex app-server turns through `before_prompt_build` 和 emit `before_compaction` / `after_compaction` 为了 native compaction items so prompt 和 compaction hooks 停止 drifting 从 Pi. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Codex harness/hooks: route native Codex app-server turns through `before_prompt_build` and emit `before_compaction` / `after_compaction` for native compaction items so prompt and compaction hooks stop drifting from Pi. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Codex harness/插件: 添加 a bundled-插件 Codex app-server extension seam 为了 async `tool_result` middleware, fire `after_tool_call` 为了 Codex 工具 runs, 和 route mirrored Codex transcript writes through `before_message_write` so 工具 integrations 停止 diverging 从 Pi. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Codex harness/plugins: add a bundled-plugin Codex app-server extension seam for async `tool_result` middleware, fire `after_tool_call` for Codex tool runs, and route mirrored Codex transcript writes through `before_message_write` so tool integrations stop diverging from Pi. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Codex harness/hooks: fire `llm_input`, `llm_output`, 和 `agent_end` 为了 native Codex app-server turns so lifecycle hooks 停止 drifting 从 Pi. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Codex harness/hooks: fire `llm_input`, `llm_output`, and `agent_end` for native Codex app-server turns so lifecycle hooks stop drifting from Pi. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: QA/Telegram: record per-scenario reply RTT 在 the live Telegram QA report 和 summary, starting 使用 the canary response. (#70550) Thanks @obviyus.
changes.rawTitle: QA/Telegram: record per-scenario reply RTT in the live Telegram QA report and summary, starting with the canary response. (#70550) Thanks @obviyus.

changes.title: Status: 添加 an explicit `Runner:` field to `/status` so sessions 现在 report whether they are running 在 embedded Pi, a CLI-backed provider, 或 an ACP harness Agent/backend such as `Codex (acp/acpx)` 或 `gemini (acp/acpx)`. (#70595)
changes.rawTitle: Status: add an explicit `Runner:` field to `/status` so sessions now report whether they are running on embedded Pi, a CLI-backed provider, or an ACP harness agent/backend such as `codex (acp/acpx)` or `gemini (acp/acpx)`. (#70595)

changes.title: Thinking defaults/status: raise the implicit default thinking level 为了 reasoning-capable 模型 从 legacy `off`/`low` fallback behavior to a safe provider-supported `medium` equivalent 当 no explicit 配置 default is set, 保留 configured-模型 reasoning metadata 当 runtime catalog loading is empty, 和 make `/status` report the same resolved default as runtime.
changes.rawTitle: Thinking defaults/status: raise the implicit default thinking level for reasoning-capable models from legacy `off`/`low` fallback behavior to a safe provider-supported `medium` equivalent when no explicit config default is set, preserve configured-model reasoning metadata when runtime catalog loading is empty, and make `/status` report the same resolved default as runtime.

changes.title: 网关/模型 pricing: fetch OpenRouter 和 LiteLLM pricing asynchronously at startup 和 extend catalog fetch timeouts to 30 seconds, reducing noisy 超时 warnings 期间 slow upstream responses.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/model pricing: fetch OpenRouter and LiteLLM pricing asynchronously at startup and extend catalog fetch timeouts to 30 seconds, reducing noisy timeout warnings during slow upstream responses.

changes.title: Agent/sessions: keep daily reset 和 idle-maintenance bookkeeping 从 bumping session activity 或 pruning freshly active routes, so active conversations no longer look newer 或 disappear 为了 maintenance-only updates.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/sessions: keep daily reset and idle-maintenance bookkeeping from bumping session activity or pruning freshly active routes, so active conversations no longer look newer or disappear for maintenance-only updates.

changes.title: 插件/install: 添加 newly installed 插件 ids to an existing `插件.允许` list 之前 enabling them, so allowlisted configs load installed 插件 之后 restart.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/install: add newly installed plugin ids to an existing `plugins.allow` list before enabling them, so allowlisted configs load installed plugins after restart.

changes.title: Status: show `Fast` 在 `/status` 当 fast mode is enabled, including 配置/default-derived fast mode, 和 omit it 当 disabled.
changes.rawTitle: Status: show `Fast` in `/status` when fast mode is enabled, including config/default-derived fast mode, and omit it when disabled.

changes.title: OpenAI/image generation: detect Azure OpenAI-style image endpoints, use Azure `API-密钥` 认证 plus deployment-scoped image URLs, honor `AZURE_OPENAI_API_VERSION`, 和 document the Azure setup 路径 so image generation 和 edits work against Azure-hosted OpenAI resources. (#70570) Thanks @zhanggpcsu.
changes.rawTitle: OpenAI/image generation: detect Azure OpenAI-style image endpoints, use Azure `api-key` auth plus deployment-scoped image URLs, honor `AZURE_OPENAI_API_VERSION`, and document the Azure setup path so image generation and edits work against Azure-hosted OpenAI resources. (#70570) Thanks @zhanggpcsu.

changes.title: Telegram/forum topics: cache recovered forum metadata 使用 bounded expiry so supergroup updates no longer need repeated `getChat` lookups 之前 topic routing.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/forum topics: cache recovered forum metadata with bounded expiry so supergroup updates no longer need repeated `getChat` lookups before topic routing.

changes.title: Onboarding/WeCom: show the official WeCom channel 插件 使用 its native Enterprise WeChat display name 和 blurb 在 the external channel catalog.
changes.rawTitle: Onboarding/WeCom: show the official WeCom channel plugin with its native Enterprise WeChat display name and blurb in the external channel catalog.

changes.title: 模型/认证: merge provider-owned default-模型 additions 从 `openclaw 模型 认证 login` 而不是 replacing `Agent.defaults.模型`, so re-authenticating an OAuth认证 provider such as OpenAI Codex no longer wipes other providers' aliases 和 per-模型 params. Migrations that must rename keys (Anthropic -> Claude CLI) opt 在 使用 `replaceDefaultModels`. 修复 #69414. (#70435) Thanks @neeravmakwana.
changes.rawTitle: Models/auth: merge provider-owned default-model additions from `openclaw models auth login` instead of replacing `agents.defaults.models`, so re-authenticating an OAuth provider such as OpenAI Codex no longer wipes other providers' aliases and per-model params. Migrations that must rename keys (Anthropic -> Claude CLI) opt in with `replaceDefaultModels`. Fixes #69414. (#70435) Thanks @neeravmakwana.

changes.title: Media understanding/audio: prefer configured 或 密钥-backed STT providers 之前 auto-detected local Whisper CLIs, so installed local transcription tools no longer shadow API providers such as Groq/OpenAI 在 `tools.media.audio` auto mode. 修复 #68727.
changes.rawTitle: Media understanding/audio: prefer configured or key-backed STT providers before auto-detected local Whisper CLIs, so installed local transcription tools no longer shadow API providers such as Groq/OpenAI in `tools.media.audio` auto mode. Fixes #68727.

changes.title: Providers/OpenAI: lock the 认证 picker wording 为了 OpenAI API 密钥, Codex 浏览器 login, 和 Codex device pairing so the setup choices no longer imply a mixed Codex/API-密钥 认证 路径. (#67848) Thanks @tmlxrd.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/OpenAI: lock the auth picker wording for OpenAI API key, Codex browser login, and Codex device pairing so the setup choices no longer imply a mixed Codex/API-key auth path. (#67848) Thanks @tmlxrd.

changes.title: Agent/BTW: route `/btw` side questions through provider stream registration 使用 the session workspace, so Ollama provider URL construction 和 workspace-scoped hooks apply 正确地. 修复 #68336. (#70413) Thanks @suboss87.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/BTW: route `/btw` side questions through provider stream registration with the session workspace, so Ollama provider URL construction and workspace-scoped hooks apply correctly. Fixes #68336. (#70413) Thanks @suboss87.

changes.title: Agent/sessions: make session transcript write locks non-reentrant 通过 default, so same-process transcript writers contend unless a helper explicitly opts 进入 nested lock ownership.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/sessions: make session transcript write locks non-reentrant by default, so same-process transcript writers contend unless a helper explicitly opts into nested lock ownership.

changes.title: ACPX/probe: expose an optional `probeAgent` 插件 配置 field so the embedded ACP runtime health probe can target a configured Agent (为了 example `opencode` 或 `claude`) 而不是 hardcoding `Codex`, 和 停止 marking the entire ACP runtime backend unavailable 当 the default probe Agent is simply not installed 或 not authenticated. (#68409) Thanks @lyfuci.
changes.rawTitle: ACPX/probe: expose an optional `probeAgent` plugin config field so the embedded ACP runtime health probe can target a configured agent (for example `opencode` or `claude`) instead of hardcoding `codex`, and stop marking the entire ACP runtime backend unavailable when the default probe agent is simply not installed or not authenticated. (#68409) Thanks @lyfuci.

changes.title: 内存 search: use sqlite-vec KNN 为了 vector recall while preserving full post-filter result limits 在 multi-模型 indexes. 修复 #69666. (#69680) Thanks @aalekh-sarvam.
changes.rawTitle: Memory search: use sqlite-vec KNN for vector recall while preserving full post-filter result limits in multi-model indexes. Fixes #69666. (#69680) Thanks @aalekh-sarvam.

changes.title: Providers/OpenAI Codex: 停止 stale per-Agent `OpenAI-Codex:default` OAuth认证 profiles 从 shadowing a newer main-Agent identity-scoped profile, 和 let `openclaw 诊断工具` offer the matching cleanup. (#70393) Thanks @pashpashpash.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/OpenAI Codex: stop stale per-agent `openai-codex:default` OAuth profiles from shadowing a newer main-agent identity-scoped profile, and let `openclaw doctor` offer the matching cleanup. (#70393) Thanks @pashpashpash.

changes.title: ACPX: route OpenClaw ACP bridge commands through the MCP协议-free runtime 路径 even 当 the 命令 is wrapped 使用 `env`, has bridge flags, 或 is resumed 从 persisted session state, so documented `acpx openclaw` setups no longer fail 在 per-session MCP协议 injection. (#68741) Thanks @alexlomt.
changes.rawTitle: ACPX: route OpenClaw ACP bridge commands through the MCP-free runtime path even when the command is wrapped with `env`, has bridge flags, or is resumed from persisted session state, so documented `acpx openclaw` setups no longer fail on per-session MCP injection. (#68741) Thanks @alexlomt.

changes.title: Codex harness: route Codex-tagged MCP协议 工具 approval elicitations through OpenClaw 插件 approvals, including current empty-schema app-server requests, while leaving generic user-input prompts fail-closed. (#68807) Thanks @kesslerio.
changes.rawTitle: Codex harness: route Codex-tagged MCP tool approval elicitations through OpenClaw plugin approvals, including current empty-schema app-server requests, while leaving generic user-input prompts fail-closed. (#68807) Thanks @kesslerio.

changes.title: WhatsApp/outbound: hold an 在-内存 active-delivery claim while a live outbound send is 在 flight, so a concurrent reconnect drain no longer re-drives the same pending queue entry 和 duplicates cron sends 7-12x 之后 the 30-minute inbound-silence watchdog fires mid-delivery. 崩溃-replay 的 fresh queue entries left behind 通过 a dead process is preserved because the claim is intentionally process-local. 修复 #70386. (#70428) Thanks @neeravmakwana.
changes.rawTitle: WhatsApp/outbound: hold an in-memory active-delivery claim while a live outbound send is in flight, so a concurrent reconnect drain no longer re-drives the same pending queue entry and duplicates cron sends 7-12x after the 30-minute inbound-silence watchdog fires mid-delivery. Crash-replay of fresh queue entries left behind by a dead process is preserved because the claim is intentionally process-local. Fixes #70386. (#70428) Thanks @neeravmakwana.

changes.title: Matrix/commands: keep Matrix DM allowlist state out 的 room control-命令 authorization, so trusted DM senders do not accidentally gain room-命令 access.
changes.rawTitle: Matrix/commands: keep Matrix DM allowlist state out of room control-command authorization, so trusted DM senders do not accidentally gain room-command access.

changes.title: Providers/SDK 重试: cap long `重试-之后` sleeps 在 Stainless-based Anthropic/OpenAI 模型 SDKs so 60s+ 重试 Windows surface immediately 为了 OpenClaw failover 而不是 blocking the run. (#68474) Thanks @jetd1.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/SDK retry: cap long `Retry-After` sleeps in Stainless-based Anthropic/OpenAI model SDKs so 60s+ retry windows surface immediately for OpenClaw failover instead of blocking the run. (#68474) Thanks @jetd1.

changes.title: Agent/TTS: 保留 spoken text 在 TTS 工具 results while defusing reply directives 在 transcript content, so future turns remember 语音 replies 不适用 treating spoken `MEDIA:` 或 语音 tags as delivery metadata. (#68869) Thanks @zqchris.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/TTS: preserve spoken text in TTS tool results while defusing reply directives in transcript content, so future turns remember voice replies without treating spoken `MEDIA:` or voice tags as delivery metadata. (#68869) Thanks @zqchris.

changes.title: Providers/OpenAI: harden 语音 Call realtime transcription against OpenAI Realtime session-更新 drift, forward language 和 prompt hints, 和 添加 live coverage 为了 realtime STT.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/OpenAI: harden Voice Call realtime transcription against OpenAI Realtime session-update drift, forward language and prompt hints, and add live coverage for realtime STT.

changes.title: Agent/Pi embedded runs: suppress the "⚠️ Agent couldn't generate a response" warning 当 the assistant already delivered user-visible content through a messaging 工具 和 the turn ended cleanly (`stopReason=停止`). Real failure modes (工具 errors, provider `stopReason=错误`, interrupted 工具 use) still surface the existing "verify 之前 retrying" warning. 修复 #70396. (#70425) Thanks @neeravmakwana.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/Pi embedded runs: suppress the "⚠️ Agent couldn't generate a response" warning when the assistant already delivered user-visible content through a messaging tool and the turn ended cleanly (`stopReason=stop`). Real failure modes (tool errors, provider `stopReason=error`, interrupted tool use) still surface the existing "verify before retrying" warning. Fixes #70396. (#70425) Thanks @neeravmakwana.

changes.title: 网关/Linux: wrap 网关-managed supervisor, PTY, MCP协议 stdio, 和 浏览器 child processes 在 a tiny `/bin/sh` shim that raises the child's own `oom_score_adj` 在 Linux, so under cgroup 内存 pressure the kernel prefers transient workers over the long-lived 网关. Opt out 使用 `OPENCLAW_CHILD_OOM_SCORE_ADJ=0`. 修复 #70404. (#70419) Thanks @neeravmakwana.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/Linux: wrap gateway-managed supervisor, PTY, MCP stdio, and browser child processes in a tiny `/bin/sh` shim that raises the child's own `oom_score_adj` on Linux, so under cgroup memory pressure the kernel prefers transient workers over the long-lived gateway. Opt out with `OPENCLAW_CHILD_OOM_SCORE_ADJ=0`. Fixes #70404. (#70419) Thanks @neeravmakwana.

changes.title: Providers/Moonshot: 停止 strict-sanitizing Kimi's native tool_call IDs (shaped like `functions.<name>:<index>`) 在 the OpenAI-compatible transport, so multi-turn agentic flows through Kimi K2.6 no longer break 之后 2-3 工具-calling rounds 当 the serving layer fails to match mangled IDs against the original 工具 definitions. Adds a `sanitizeToolCallIds` opt-out to the shared `OpenAI-compatible` replay family helper 和 wires Moonshot to it. 修复 #62319. (#70030) Thanks @LeoDu0314.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/Moonshot: stop strict-sanitizing Kimi's native tool_call IDs (shaped like `functions.<name>:<index>`) on the OpenAI-compatible transport, so multi-turn agentic flows through Kimi K2.6 no longer break after 2-3 tool-calling rounds when the serving layer fails to match mangled IDs against the original tool definitions. Adds a `sanitizeToolCallIds` opt-out to the shared `openai-compatible` replay family helper and wires Moonshot to it. Fixes #62319. (#70030) Thanks @LeoDu0314.

changes.title: Dependencies/安全: override transitive `uuid` to `14.0.0`, clearing the runtime advisory across dependencies.
changes.rawTitle: Dependencies/security: override transitive `uuid` to `14.0.0`, clearing the runtime advisory across dependencies.

changes.title: Codex harness: ignore dynamic 工具 descriptions 当 deciding whether to 复用 a native app-server thread while still fingerprinting 工具 schemas, so channel-specific copy changes no longer reset otherwise compatible Codex conversations. (#69976) Thanks @chen-zhang-cs-code.
changes.rawTitle: Codex harness: ignore dynamic tool descriptions when deciding whether to reuse a native app-server thread while still fingerprinting tool schemas, so channel-specific copy changes no longer reset otherwise compatible Codex conversations. (#69976) Thanks @chen-zhang-cs-code.

changes.title: Codex harness: expose the Codex app-server 模型 catalog 在 `模型 list/status`, 避免 startup hangs 从 app-server discovery timeouts, 和 accept current Codex turn-completion notifications so Docker live 网关 turns finish reliably.
changes.rawTitle: Codex harness: expose the Codex app-server model catalog in `models list/status`, avoid startup hangs from app-server discovery timeouts, and accept current Codex turn-completion notifications so Docker live gateway turns finish reliably.

changes.title: Codex harness: drop invalid legacy app-server `serviceTier` values such as `"priority"` 之前 native thread 和 turn requests, while keeping supported Codex tiers limited to `"fast"` 和 `"flex"`. 修复 #64815.
changes.rawTitle: Codex harness: drop invalid legacy app-server `serviceTier` values such as `"priority"` before native thread and turn requests, while keeping supported Codex tiers limited to `"fast"` and `"flex"`. Fixes #64815.

changes.title: Codex harness: show bounded, sanitized permission target samples 在 app-server approval prompts, so native permission requests keep their specific hosts, roots, 和 paths visible 不适用 leaking home usernames 或 URL credentials. (#70340) Thanks @Lucenx9.
changes.rawTitle: Codex harness: show bounded, sanitized permission target samples in app-server approval prompts, so native permission requests keep their specific hosts, roots, and paths visible without leaking home usernames or URL credentials. (#70340) Thanks @Lucenx9.

changes.title: Docs/Codex harness: narrow native compaction docs to the current start/completion signals, 不适用 promising a readable summary 或 kept-entry audit list yet. (#69612) Thanks @91wan.
changes.rawTitle: Docs/Codex harness: narrow native compaction docs to the current start/completion signals, without promising a readable summary or kept-entry audit list yet. (#69612) Thanks @91wan.

changes.title: Providers/Amazon Bedrock: use known context-window metadata 为了 discovered 模型 while keeping the unknown-模型 fallback conservative, so compaction 和 overflow handling 改进 为了 newer Bedrock 模型 不适用 overstating unlisted 模型 limits. Thanks @wirjo.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/Amazon Bedrock: use known context-window metadata for discovered models while keeping the unknown-model fallback conservative, so compaction and overflow handling improve for newer Bedrock models without overstating unlisted model limits. Thanks @wirjo.

changes.title: Providers/Amazon Bedrock Mantle: refresh IAM-backed bearer tokens at runtime 而不是 baking discovery-time tokens 进入 provider 配置, so long-lived Mantle sessions keep working 之后 the initial 令牌 ages out. Thanks @wirjo.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/Amazon Bedrock Mantle: refresh IAM-backed bearer tokens at runtime instead of baking discovery-time tokens into provider config, so long-lived Mantle sessions keep working after the initial token ages out. Thanks @wirjo.

changes.title: 配置/includes: write through single-file top-level includes 为了 isolated OpenClaw-owned mutations, so `插件 install` 和 `插件 更新` 更新 an included `插件.json5` file 而不是 flattening modular `$include` configs. 修复 #41050 和 #66048.
changes.rawTitle: Config/includes: write through single-file top-level includes for isolated OpenClaw-owned mutations, so `plugins install` and `plugins update` update an included `plugins.json5` file instead of flattening modular `$include` configs. Fixes #41050 and #66048.

changes.title: 配置/reload: plan 网关 reloads 从 source-authored 配置 而不是 runtime-materialized snapshots, so 插件 更新 writes no longer trigger false restarts 从 derived provider/插件 配置 paths. 修复 #68732.
changes.rawTitle: Config/reload: plan gateway reloads from source-authored config instead of runtime-materialized snapshots, so plugin update writes no longer trigger false restarts from derived provider/plugin config paths. Fixes #68732.

changes.title: 插件/更新: skip npm 插件 reinstall/配置 rewrites 当 the installed version 和 recorded artifact identity already match the registry target, let bare npm package names 解决 back to tracked install records, 和 point already-installed `插件 install` attempts at `插件 更新` / `--force` 而不是 a hook-pack fallback. 修复 #46955, #67957, 和 #68073.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/update: skip npm plugin reinstall/config rewrites when the installed version and recorded artifact identity already match the registry target, let bare npm package names resolve back to tracked install records, and point already-installed `plugins install` attempts at `plugins update` / `--force` instead of a hook-pack fallback. Fixes #46955, #67957, and #68073.

changes.title: Agent/MCP协议: keep `MCP协议.servers` 和 bundle MCP协议 tools available 在 Pi embedded
changes.rawTitle: Agents/MCP: keep `mcp.servers` and bundle MCP tools available in Pi embedded

changes.title: 插件/startup: tolerate transient bundled-channel catalog/metadata drift while auto-enabling configured 插件, so CLI 和 网关 startup no longer 崩溃 当 a channel id is known 但是 its display metadata is unavailable.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/startup: tolerate transient bundled-channel catalog/metadata drift while auto-enabling configured plugins, so CLI and gateway startup no longer crash when a channel id is known but its display metadata is unavailable.

changes.title: CLI/Claude: report CLI-backed reply runs as streaming while Claude/Codex CLI turns are still 在 flight, so WebChat keeps visible response state until the backend finishes. 修复 #70125.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/Claude: report CLI-backed reply runs as streaming while Claude/Codex CLI turns are still in flight, so WebChat keeps visible response state until the backend finishes. Fixes #70125.

changes.title: Slack/streaming: fall back to normal Slack replies 为了 Slack Connect streams rejected 之前 the SDK flushes its local buffer, so short replies no longer disappear 或 report success 之前 Slack acknowledges delivery. 修复 #70295. (#70370) Thanks @mvanhorn.
changes.rawTitle: Slack/streaming: fall back to normal Slack replies for Slack Connect streams rejected before the SDK flushes its local buffer, so short replies no longer disappear or report success before Slack acknowledges delivery. Fixes #70295. (#70370) Thanks @mvanhorn.

changes.title: Codex harness: rotate the shared app-server websocket client 当 the configured bearer 令牌 changes, so 认证-令牌 refreshes reconnect 使用 the new `Authorization` header 而不是 reusing a stale socket. (#70328) Thanks @Lucenx9.
changes.rawTitle: Codex harness: rotate the shared app-server websocket client when the configured bearer token changes, so auth-token refreshes reconnect with the new `Authorization` header instead of reusing a stale socket. (#70328) Thanks @Lucenx9.

changes.title: Channels/sandbox: derive runtime policy keys 为了 external direct messages that share the main conversation, so sandbox/工具 policy no longer treats channel-originated DMs as local main-session runs.
changes.rawTitle: Channels/sandbox: derive runtime policy keys for external direct messages that share the main conversation, so sandbox/tool policy no longer treats channel-originated DMs as local main-session runs.

changes.title: 配置/模型: merge provider-scoped 模型 allowlist updates 和 protect 模型/provider map writes 从 accidental full replacement, adding `配置 set --merge` 为了 additive updates 和 `--replace` 为了 intentional clobbers. 修复 #65920, #68392, 和 #68653.
changes.rawTitle: Config/models: merge provider-scoped model allowlist updates and protect model/provider map writes from accidental full replacement, adding `config set --merge` for additive updates and `--replace` for intentional clobbers. Fixes #65920, #68392, and #68653.

changes.title: Agent/Pi 认证: 保留 AWS SDK-authenticated Bedrock runs 为了 IMDS 和 task-role setups, clear stale refresh timers 在 sentinel fallback, 和 log unexpected runtime-认证 prep failures 而不是 静默地 leaving the provider unauthenticated. Thanks @wirjo.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/Pi auth: preserve AWS SDK-authenticated Bedrock runs for IMDS and task-role setups, clear stale refresh timers on sentinel fallback, and log unexpected runtime-auth prep failures instead of silently leaving the provider unauthenticated. Thanks @wirjo.

changes.title: 配置/网关: restore last-known-good 配置 在 critical clobber signatures such as missing metadata, missing `网关.mode`, 或 sharp size drops, preventing 网关 崩溃 loops 当 a valid backup exists. 修复 #70336.
changes.rawTitle: Config/gateway: restore last-known-good config on critical clobber signatures such as missing metadata, missing `gateway.mode`, or sharp size drops, preventing gateway crash loops when a valid backup exists. Fixes #70336.

changes.title: 配置/网关: recover configs accidentally prefixed 使用 non-JSON output 期间 网关 startup 或 `openclaw 诊断工具 --修复`, preserving the clobbered file as a backup while leaving normal 配置 reads read-only.
changes.rawTitle: Config/gateway: recover configs accidentally prefixed with non-JSON output during gateway startup or `openclaw doctor --fix`, preserving the clobbered file as a backup while leaving normal config reads read-only.

changes.title: Agent/GitHub Copilot: normalize connection-bound Responses item IDs 在 the Copilot provider wrapper so replayed histories no longer fail 之后 the upstream connection changes. (#69362) Thanks @Menci.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/GitHub Copilot: normalize connection-bound Responses item IDs in the Copilot provider wrapper so replayed histories no longer fail after the upstream connection changes. (#69362) Thanks @Menci.

changes.title: Pi embedded runs: pass real built-在 tools 进入 Pi session creation 和 then narrow active 工具 names 之后 custom 工具 registration, so the runner 和 compaction paths compile cleanly 和 keep OpenClaw-managed custom 工具 allowlists 不适用 feeding string arrays 进入 `createAgentSession`. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Pi embedded runs: pass real built-in tools into Pi session creation and then narrow active tool names after custom tool registration, so the runner and compaction paths compile cleanly and keep OpenClaw-managed custom tool allowlists without feeding string arrays into `createAgentSession`. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Agent/OpenAI websocket: route native OpenAI websocket metadata 和 session-header decisions through the shared endpoint classifier so local mocks 和 custom `模型.providers.OpenAI.baseUrl` endpoints stay out 的 the native OpenAI 路径 consistently across embedded-runner 和 websocket transport code. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/OpenAI websocket: route native OpenAI websocket metadata and session-header decisions through the shared endpoint classifier so local mocks and custom `models.providers.openai.baseUrl` endpoints stay out of the native OpenAI path consistently across embedded-runner and websocket transport code. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Cron/MCP协议: retire bundled MCP协议 runtimes through one shared cleanup 路径 为了 isolated cron run ends, persistent cron session rollover, 和 direct cron `deleteAfterRun` fallback cleanup. 修复 #69145, #68623, 和 #68827.
changes.rawTitle: Cron/MCP: retire bundled MCP runtimes through one shared cleanup path for isolated cron run ends, persistent cron session rollover, and direct cron `deleteAfterRun` fallback cleanup. Fixes #69145, #68623, and #68827.

changes.title: MCP协议/网关: tear down stdio MCP协议 process trees 在 transport close 和 dispose bundled MCP协议 runtimes 期间 session delete/reset, preventing orphaned wrapper/server processes 从 accumulating. 修复 #68809 和 #69465.
changes.rawTitle: MCP/gateway: tear down stdio MCP process trees on transport close and dispose bundled MCP runtimes during session delete/reset, preventing orphaned wrapper/server processes from accumulating. Fixes #68809 and #69465.

changes.title: Agent/MCP协议: retire bundled MCP协议 runtimes 之后 completed one-shot subagent cleanup 和 nested `sessions_send` steps, while keeping persistent subagent sessions warm.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/MCP: retire bundled MCP runtimes after completed one-shot subagent cleanup and nested `sessions_send` steps, while keeping persistent subagent sessions warm.

changes.title: 配置: render validation warnings 使用 real line breaks 而不是 a literal `\n` sequence 在 CLI/audit output. 修复 #70140.
changes.rawTitle: Config: render validation warnings with real line breaks instead of a literal `\n` sequence in CLI/audit output. Fixes #70140.

changes.title: Cron/诊断工具: repair malformed persisted cron job IDs through `openclaw 诊断工具`, including legacy `jobId`, non-string `id`, 和 missing `id` rows, so `cron list` no longer needs display-layer coercion 为了 corrupt store data. 修复 #70128.
changes.rawTitle: Cron/doctor: repair malformed persisted cron job IDs through `openclaw doctor`, including legacy `jobId`, non-string `id`, and missing `id` rows, so `cron list` no longer needs display-layer coercion for corrupt store data. Fixes #70128.

changes.title: Discord: normalize prefixed channel targets only at the thread-binding API boundary, so `sessions_spawn({ runtime: "acp", thread: true })` can create child threads 从 Discord channels 不适用 破坏性变更 current-channel ACP bindings. (#68034) Thanks @Zetarcos.
changes.rawTitle: Discord: normalize prefixed channel targets only at the thread-binding API boundary, so `sessions_spawn({ runtime: "acp", thread: true })` can create child threads from Discord channels without breaking current-channel ACP bindings. (#68034) Thanks @Zetarcos.

changes.title: Discord: harden inbound thread metadata handling against partial Carbon channel getters, so non-命令 thread messages 和 queued jobs no longer 崩溃 当 `name`, `parentId`, `parent`, 或 `ownerId` requires fetched raw data.
changes.rawTitle: Discord: harden inbound thread metadata handling against partial Carbon channel getters, so non-command thread messages and queued jobs no longer crash when `name`, `parentId`, `parent`, or `ownerId` requires fetched raw data.

changes.title: 插件/startup: pre-normalize 和 cache Jiti alias maps 之前 creating 插件 loaders, so module-scoped loader filenames do not reintroduce per-插件 alias-normalization startup cost. 修复 #70186.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/startup: pre-normalize and cache Jiti alias maps before creating plugin loaders, so module-scoped loader filenames do not reintroduce per-plugin alias-normalization startup cost. Fixes #70186.
