changes.rawTitle: ACP/Codex: run the bundled Codex ACP harness with an isolated `CODEX_HOME` and avoid writing incomplete ChatGPT auth bridge files, so Codex ACP sessions no longer clobber the user's real Codex CLI auth. Fixes #70234. Thanks @Lonobers88.

changes.title: 网关/client: keep long-running RPCs such as ACP `Agent.wait` calls 在 charge 的 their own 超时 而不是 closing the websocket 在 a missed app-level tick while work is still pending.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/client: keep long-running RPCs such as ACP `agent.wait` calls in charge of their own timeout instead of closing the websocket on a missed app-level tick while work is still pending.

changes.title: Telegram/webhooks: lower the grammY Webhook callback 超时 to 5s so Telegram gets an early 200 response 而不是 retrying long-running updates as read timeouts. (#70146) Thanks @friday-james.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/webhooks: lower the grammY webhook callback timeout to 5s so Telegram gets an early 200 response instead of retrying long-running updates as read timeouts. (#70146) Thanks @friday-james.

changes.title: Telegram/polling: rebuild the polling HTTP transport 之后 `getUpdates` 409 conflicts, so retries use a fresh TCP connection 而不是 looping 在 a Telegram-terminated keep-alive socket. (#69873) Thanks @hclsys.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/polling: rebuild the polling HTTP transport after `getUpdates` 409 conflicts, so retries use a fresh TCP connection instead of looping on a Telegram-terminated keep-alive socket. (#69873) Thanks @hclsys.

changes.rawTitle: Media delivery: strip persisted base64 audio payloads from webchat history, resolve stored `media://inbound/*` attachments before local-root checks, suppress duplicate Telegram voice/audio sends when TTS emits the same media twice, and support custom image-model IDs that already include their provider prefix.

changes.title: Slack/files: 解决 `downloadFile` bot tokens 从 the runtime 配置 当 callers provide `cfg` 不适用 an explicit 令牌 或 prebuilt client, preserving cfg-only file downloads outside the action runtime 路径. (#70160) Thanks @martingarramon.
changes.rawTitle: Slack/files: resolve `downloadFile` bot tokens from the runtime config when callers provide `cfg` without an explicit token or prebuilt client, preserving cfg-only file downloads outside the action runtime path. (#70160) Thanks @martingarramon.

changes.rawTitle: Slack/HTTP: dispatch registered Request URL webhooks through the same handler registry used by Slack monitor setup, so HTTP-mode Slack events no longer 404 after successful route registration. (#70275) Thanks @FroeMic.

changes.rawTitle: Slack/runtime bindings: route focused Slack thread replies through their bound ACP session instead of preparing replies against the default agent shell. Fixes #67739. Thanks @Frankla20.

changes.rawTitle: CLI sessions: persist CLI session clearing through the atomic session-store merge path, so expired Claude/Codex CLI bindings are actually removed before retrying without the stale session id. (#70298) Thanks @HFConsultant.

changes.rawTitle: ACP/sessions_spawn: honor explicit `model` overrides for ACP child sessions instead of silently falling back to the target agent default model. (#70210) Thanks @felix-miao.

changes.rawTitle: Diffs/viewer: re-read remote viewer access policy from live runtime config on each request, so toggling `plugins.entries.diffs.config.security.allowRemoteViewer` closes proxied viewer access immediately instead of waiting for a restart. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Diffs/tooling: re-read `viewerBaseUrl`, presentation defaults, 和 viewer access policy 从 live runtime 配置, 和 fail closed 当 the live `diffs` 插件 entry disappears 而不是 reviving startup viewer settings. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Diffs/tooling: re-read `viewerBaseUrl`, presentation defaults, and viewer access policy from live runtime config, and fail closed when the live `diffs` plugin entry disappears instead of reviving startup viewer settings. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 内存/LanceDB: 停止 resurrecting removed live `内存-lancedb` hook 配置 从 startup snapshots, so deleting 或 disabling the 插件 entry shuts off auto-recall 和 auto-capture 不适用 a restart. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/LanceDB: stop resurrecting removed live `memory-lancedb` hook config from startup snapshots, so deleting or disabling the plugin entry shuts off auto-recall and auto-capture without a restart. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 内存/LanceDB: keep auto-recall 和 auto-capture hooks wired 当 those settings start disabled, so turning them 在 在 live 配置 starts recall 和 capture 不适用 waiting 为了 a restart. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/LanceDB: keep auto-recall and auto-capture hooks wired when those settings start disabled, so turning them on in live config starts recall and capture without waiting for a restart. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Skill Workshop: keep the 工具 plus `before_prompt_build` / `agent_end` hooks wired while the 插件 is disabled at startup, so turning the 插件 back 在 在 live 配置 starts guidance 和 capture 不适用 waiting 为了 a restart. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Skill Workshop: keep the tool plus `before_prompt_build` / `agent_end` hooks wired while the plugin is disabled at startup, so turning the plugin back on in live config starts guidance and capture without waiting for a restart. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Active 内存: 停止 reviving removed live `active-内存` 配置 从 startup snapshots, so removing the 插件 entry turns the hook off immediately 而不是 waiting 为了 a restart. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Active Memory: stop reviving removed live `active-memory` config from startup snapshots, so removing the plugin entry turns the hook off immediately instead of waiting for a restart. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: GitHub Copilot: re-read 插件 discovery 配置 从 the live runtime snapshot, so toggling `插件.entries.GitHub-copilot.配置.discovery.enabled` takes effect 不适用 a restart. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: GitHub Copilot: re-read plugin discovery config from the live runtime snapshot, so toggling `plugins.entries.github-copilot.config.discovery.enabled` takes effect without a restart. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Ollama: re-read 插件 discovery 配置 从 the live runtime snapshot, so toggling `插件.entries.ollama.配置.discovery.enabled` takes effect 不适用 a restart. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Ollama: re-read plugin discovery config from the live runtime snapshot, so toggling `plugins.entries.ollama.config.discovery.enabled` takes effect without a restart. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: OpenAI: re-read the 插件 prompt-overlay personality 从 live runtime 配置, so GPT-5 system prompt contributions 更新 不适用 a restart 当 `插件.entries.OpenAI.配置.personality` changes. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: OpenAI: re-read the plugin prompt-overlay personality from live runtime config, so GPT-5 system prompt contributions update without a restart when `plugins.entries.openai.config.personality` changes. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Amazon Bedrock: re-read live discovery 和 guardrail 插件 配置, so toggling `插件.entries.amazon-bedrock.配置.discovery` 或 `插件.entries.amazon-bedrock.配置.guardrail` takes effect 不适用 a restart. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Amazon Bedrock: re-read live discovery and guardrail plugin config, so toggling `plugins.entries.amazon-bedrock.config.discovery` or `plugins.entries.amazon-bedrock.config.guardrail` takes effect without a restart. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Codex: re-read the 插件 discovery 配置 从 the live runtime snapshot, so toggling `插件.entries.Codex.配置.discovery` takes effect 不适用 a restart. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Codex: re-read the plugin discovery config from the live runtime snapshot, so toggling `plugins.entries.codex.config.discovery` takes effect without a restart. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Agent/subagents: drop bare `NO_REPLY` 从 the parent turn 当 the session still has pending spawned children, so direct-conversation surfaces such as Telegram DMs no longer rewrite the sentinel 进入 visible fallback chatter while waiting 为了 the child completion event. (#69942) Thanks @neeravmakwana.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/subagents: drop bare `NO_REPLY` from the parent turn when the session still has pending spawned children, so direct-conversation surfaces such as Telegram DMs no longer rewrite the sentinel into visible fallback chatter while waiting for the child completion event. (#69942) Thanks @neeravmakwana.

changes.title: 插件/install: keep bundled 插件 dependencies off npm install while repairing them 当 插件 activate 从 a packaged install, including 飞书/Lark, 浏览器, 和 direct bundled channel setup-entry loads.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/install: keep bundled plugin dependencies off npm install while repairing them when plugins activate from a packaged install, including Feishu/Lark, Browser, and direct bundled channel setup-entry loads.

changes.title: CLI/channels: skip 和 cache bundled channel 插件, setup, 和 secrets load failures 期间 read-only discovery, so one broken unused bundled channel cannot 崩溃 `openclaw status` 或 bootstrap secret scans.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/channels: skip and cache bundled channel plugin, setup, and secrets load failures during read-only discovery, so one broken unused bundled channel cannot crash `openclaw status` or bootstrap secret scans.

changes.title: 内存/LanceDB: 重试 initialization 之后 a failed LanceDB load 和 report unsupported Intel macOS native runtime clearly 而不是 caching the failure 或 repeatedly attempting an install that cannot work.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/LanceDB: retry initialization after a failed LanceDB load and report unsupported Intel macOS native runtime clearly instead of caching the failure or repeatedly attempting an install that cannot work.

changes.title: CLI/Claude: hash only static extra system prompt parts 当 deciding whether to 复用 a CLI session, so per-message inbound metadata no longer resets Claude CLI conversations 在 every turn. (#70122) Thanks @zijunl.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/Claude: hash only static extra system prompt parts when deciding whether to reuse a CLI session, so per-message inbound metadata no longer resets Claude CLI conversations on every turn. (#70122) Thanks @zijunl.

changes.title: Hooks/Slack: standardize shared message hook routing fields (`threadId` / `replyToId`) 和 停止 Slack outbound delivery 从 re-running `message_sending` inside the channel adapter, so 插件 like thread-ownership make one outbound routing decision per reply. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Hooks/Slack: standardize shared message hook routing fields (`threadId` / `replyToId`) and stop Slack outbound delivery from re-running `message_sending` inside the channel adapter, so plugins like thread-ownership make one outbound routing decision per reply. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Auto-reply/media: share one run-scoped reply media context 之间 streamed block delivery 和 final payload filtering, so a local `MEDIA:` attachment is staged once 和 duplicate media sends are suppressed reliably. (#68111) Thanks @ayeshakhalid192007-dev.
changes.rawTitle: Auto-reply/media: share one run-scoped reply media context between streamed block delivery and final payload filtering, so a local `MEDIA:` attachment is staged once and duplicate media sends are suppressed reliably. (#68111) Thanks @ayeshakhalid192007-dev.

changes.title: 插件/网关 hooks: expose startup 配置, workspace dir, 和 a live cron getter 在 the typed `gateway_start` hook, 和 move 内存-core managed dreaming off the internal `网关:startup` bridge so cron reconciliation stays 在 the public 插件 hook 路径. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/gateway hooks: expose startup config, workspace dir, and a live cron getter on the typed `gateway_start` hook, and move memory-core managed dreaming off the internal `gateway:startup` bridge so cron reconciliation stays on the public plugin hook path. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/配置: read 插件 trust decisions 从 the source 配置 snapshot 当 a resolved runtime snapshot is active, so `插件.允许` remains enforced 和 `诊断工具`/网关 startup no longer warn that the allowlist is empty 当 it is configured. 修复 #70161. Also 修复 #70141.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/config: read plugin trust decisions from the source config snapshot when a resolved runtime snapshot is active, so `plugins.allow` remains enforced and `doctor`/gateway startup no longer warn that the allowlist is empty when it is configured. Fixes #70161. Also fixes #70141.

changes.title: Agent/OpenAI-completions: 启用 malformed streamed 工具-call argument repair 为了 self-hosted OpenAI-compatible backends such as Kimi/SGLang, so fragmented 工具-call arguments no longer reach tools as empty 或 unusable objects. 修复 #69672. (#70294) Thanks @MonkeyLeeT.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/openai-completions: enable malformed streamed tool-call argument repair for self-hosted OpenAI-compatible backends such as Kimi/SGLang, so fragmented tool-call arguments no longer reach tools as empty or unusable objects. Fixes #69672. (#70294) Thanks @MonkeyLeeT.

changes.title: 网关/restart: 保留 group 和 channel chat context 当 resuming an Agent turn 之后 a 网关 restart, so continuation replies keep the same prompt, routing, 和 工具-status behavior as the original conversation.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/restart: preserve group and channel chat context when resuming an agent turn after a Gateway restart, so continuation replies keep the same prompt, routing, and tool-status behavior as the original conversation.

changes.title: 网关/pairing: shared-secret loopback CLI clients 现在 静默地 auto-approve `metadata-upgrade` pairing (platform / device family refresh) 而不是 being disconnected 使用 `1008 pairing required`. This matches the scope-upgrade 和 role-upgrade behavior added 在 #69431 和 unblocks non-interactive CLI automation 当 a paired-device record has a stale platform string (e.g. device 密钥 replicated across hosts, install migrated 之间 OSes, 或 platform-string format changed 之间 OpenClaw versions). 浏览器 / Control-界面 clients keep the existing approval-required flow 为了 metadata changes.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/pairing: shared-secret loopback CLI clients now silently auto-approve `metadata-upgrade` pairing (platform / device family refresh) instead of being disconnected with `1008 pairing required`. This matches the scope-upgrade and role-upgrade behavior added in #69431 and unblocks non-interactive CLI automation when a paired-device record has a stale platform string (e.g. device key replicated across hosts, install migrated between OSes, or platform-string format changed between OpenClaw versions). Browser / Control-UI clients keep the existing approval-required flow for metadata changes.

changes.title: 网关/pairing: treat any forwarded-header evidence (`Forwarded`, `X-Forwarded-*`, 或 `X-Real-IP`) as proxied WebSocket traffic 之前 pairing locality checks, so reverse-代理 topologies cannot use the loopback shared-secret helper auto-pairing 路径.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/pairing: treat any forwarded-header evidence (`Forwarded`, `X-Forwarded-*`, or `X-Real-IP`) as proxied WebSocket traffic before pairing locality checks, so reverse-proxy topologies cannot use the loopback shared-secret helper auto-pairing path.

changes.title: Agent/OpenAI: treat exact `NO_REPLY` assistant output as a deliberate silent reply 在 embedded runs, so GPT-5.4 turns 使用 signed reasoning plus a silent final no longer surface a false incomplete-turn 错误.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/OpenAI: treat exact `NO_REPLY` assistant output as a deliberate silent reply in embedded runs, so GPT-5.4 turns with signed reasoning plus a silent final no longer surface a false incomplete-turn error.

changes.title: Auto-reply/streaming: 保留 streamed reply directives through chunk boundaries 和 phase-aware `final_answer` delivery, so split `MEDIA:<路径>` lines, 语音 tags, 和 reply targets reach channel delivery 而不是 leaking as text 或 being dropped. (#70243) Thanks @zqchris.
changes.rawTitle: Auto-reply/streaming: preserve streamed reply directives through chunk boundaries and phase-aware `final_answer` delivery, so split `MEDIA:<path>` lines, voice tags, and reply targets reach channel delivery instead of leaking as text or being dropped. (#70243) Thanks @zqchris.

changes.title: Anthropic/Claude Opus 4.7: normalize Opus 4.7 和 `claude-CLI` Opus 4.7 variants to a 1M context window 在 resolved runtime metadata 和 active-Agent status/context reporting, so they no longer inherit the stale 200k fallback. Thanks @BunsDev.
changes.rawTitle: Anthropic/Claude Opus 4.7: normalize Opus 4.7 and `claude-cli` Opus 4.7 variants to a 1M context window in resolved runtime metadata and active-agent status/context reporting, so they no longer inherit the stale 200k fallback. Thanks @BunsDev.

changes.title: 网关/pairing webchat: render `/pair qr` replies as structured media 而不是 raw markdown text, 保留 inline reply threading 和 silent-control handling 在 media replies, 避免 persisting sensitive QR images 进入 transcript history, 和 keep local webchat media embedding behind internal-only trust markers. (#70047) Thanks @BunsDev.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/pairing webchat: render `/pair qr` replies as structured media instead of raw markdown text, preserve inline reply threading and silent-control handling on media replies, avoid persisting sensitive QR images into transcript history, and keep local webchat media embedding behind internal-only trust markers. (#70047) Thanks @BunsDev.

changes.title: Codex harness: default app-server runs to unchained local execution, so OpenAI heartbeats can use network 和 shell tools 不适用 stalling behind native Codex approvals 或 the workspace-write sandbox.
changes.rawTitle: Codex harness: default app-server runs to unchained local execution, so OpenAI heartbeats can use network and shell tools without stalling behind native Codex approvals or the workspace-write sandbox.

changes.title: Codex harness: fail closed 为了 unknown native app-server approval methods 而不是 routing unsupported future approval shapes through OpenClaw approval grants. (#70356) Thanks @Lucenx9.
changes.rawTitle: Codex harness: fail closed for unknown native app-server approval methods instead of routing unsupported future approval shapes through OpenClaw approval grants. (#70356) Thanks @Lucenx9.

changes.title: Codex harness: apply the GPT-5 behavior 和 heartbeat prompt overlay to native Codex app-server runs, so `Codex/gpt-5.x` sessions get the same follow-through, 工具-use, 和 proactive heartbeat guidance as OpenAI GPT-5 runs.
changes.rawTitle: Codex harness: apply the GPT-5 behavior and heartbeat prompt overlay to native Codex app-server runs, so `codex/gpt-5.x` sessions get the same follow-through, tool-use, and proactive heartbeat guidance as OpenAI GPT-5 runs.

changes.title: Codex harness: 添加 an explicit Guardian mode 为了 Codex app-server approvals, plus a Docker live probe 为了 approved 和 ask-back Guardian decisions, while keeping default app-server runs unchained 为了 unattended local heartbeats. The legacy `OPENCLAW_CODEX_APP_SERVER_GUARDIAN` shortcut is removed; use 插件 配置 `appServer.mode: "guardian"` 或 `OPENCLAW_CODEX_APP_SERVER_MODE=guardian`. Thanks @pashpashpash.
changes.rawTitle: Codex harness: add an explicit Guardian mode for Codex app-server approvals, plus a Docker live probe for approved and ask-back Guardian decisions, while keeping default app-server runs unchained for unattended local heartbeats. The legacy `OPENCLAW_CODEX_APP_SERVER_GUARDIAN` shortcut is removed; use plugin config `appServer.mode: "guardian"` or `OPENCLAW_CODEX_APP_SERVER_MODE=guardian`. Thanks @pashpashpash.

changes.title: OpenAI/Responses: keep embedded OpenAI Responses runs 在 HTTP 当 `模型.providers.OpenAI.baseUrl` points at a local mock 或 other non-public endpoint, so mocked/custom endpoints no longer drift onto the hardcoded public websocket transport. (#69815) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: OpenAI/Responses: keep embedded OpenAI Responses runs on HTTP when `models.providers.openai.baseUrl` points at a local mock or other non-public endpoint, so mocked/custom endpoints no longer drift onto the hardcoded public websocket transport. (#69815) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Channels/配置: require resolved runtime 配置 在 channel send/action/client helpers 和 block runtime helper `loadConfig()` calls, so SecretRefs are resolved at startup/boundaries 而不是 being re-read 期间 sends.
changes.rawTitle: Channels/config: require resolved runtime config on channel send/action/client helpers and block runtime helper `loadConfig()` calls, so SecretRefs are resolved at startup/boundaries instead of being re-read during sends.

changes.title: Discord: pass resolved runtime 配置 through guild 和 moderation action helpers, so thread-originated Discord commands can run channel, member, role, 和 guild actions 不适用 falling back to runtime 配置 reads. (#70215) Thanks @szponeczek.
changes.rawTitle: Discord: pass resolved runtime config through guild and moderation action helpers, so thread-originated Discord commands can run channel, member, role, and guild actions without falling back to runtime config reads. (#70215) Thanks @szponeczek.

changes.title: CLI/channels: 保留 bundled setup promotion metadata 当 a loaded partial channel 插件 omits it, so adding a non-default account still moves legacy single-account fields such as Telegram `streaming` 进入 `accounts.default`.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/channels: preserve bundled setup promotion metadata when a loaded partial channel plugin omits it, so adding a non-default account still moves legacy single-account fields such as Telegram `streaming` into `accounts.default`.

changes.title: Telegram: keep the sent-message ownership cache isolated per configured session store, so own-message reaction filtering remains correct 使用 custom `session.store` paths.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram: keep the sent-message ownership cache isolated per configured session store, so own-message reaction filtering remains correct with custom `session.store` paths.

changes.title: 安全/更新: fail closed 当 exact pinned npm 插件 或 hook-pack updates detect integrity drift, 和 expose aborted 插件 drift details 在 `openclaw 更新 --json`.
changes.rawTitle: Security/update: fail closed when exact pinned npm plugin or hook-pack updates detect integrity drift, and expose aborted plugin drift details in `openclaw update --json`.

changes.title: Ollama: forward OpenClaw thinking control to native `/API/chat` requests as top-level `think`, so `/think off` 和 `openclaw Agent --thinking off` suppress thinking 在 模型 such as qwen3 而不是 idling until the watchdog fires. 修复 #69902. (#69967) Thanks @WZH8898.
changes.rawTitle: Ollama: forward OpenClaw thinking control to native `/api/chat` requests as top-level `think`, so `/think off` and `openclaw agent --thinking off` suppress thinking on models such as qwen3 instead of idling until the watchdog fires. Fixes #69902. (#69967) Thanks @WZH8898.

changes.title: 内存-core/dreaming: suppress the startup-only managed dreaming cron unavailable warning 当 the cron service is still attaching, while preserving the runtime warning if cron genuinely remains unavailable. 修复 #69939. (#69941) Thanks @Sanjays2402.
changes.rawTitle: Memory-core/dreaming: suppress the startup-only managed dreaming cron unavailable warning when the cron service is still attaching, while preserving the runtime warning if cron genuinely remains unavailable. Fixes #69939. (#69941) Thanks @Sanjays2402.

changes.title: Mattermost: suppress reasoning-only payloads even 当 they arrive as blockquoted `> Reasoning:` text, preventing `/reasoning 在` 从 leaking thinking 进入 channel posts. (#69927) Thanks @lawrence3699.
changes.rawTitle: Mattermost: suppress reasoning-only payloads even when they arrive as blockquoted `> Reasoning:` text, preventing `/reasoning on` from leaking thinking into channel posts. (#69927) Thanks @lawrence3699.

changes.title: Discord: read `channel.parentId` through a safe accessor 在 the slash-命令, reaction, 和 模型-picker paths so partial `GuildThreadChannel` prototype getters no longer throw `Cannot access rawData 在 partial Channel` 当 commands like `/new` run 从 inside a thread. 修复 #69861. (#69908) Thanks @neeravmakwana.
changes.rawTitle: Discord: read `channel.parentId` through a safe accessor in the slash-command, reaction, and model-picker paths so partial `GuildThreadChannel` prototype getters no longer throw `Cannot access rawData on partial Channel` when commands like `/new` run from inside a thread. Fixes #69861. (#69908) Thanks @neeravmakwana.

changes.title: Discord: use safe channel name 和 parent accessors across 语音 命令 authorization, so `/vc` commands 从 partial Discord thread channels no longer 崩溃 在 Carbon rawData getters. (#70199) Thanks @hanamizuki.
changes.rawTitle: Discord: use safe channel name and parent accessors across voice command authorization, so `/vc` commands from partial Discord thread channels no longer crash on Carbon rawData getters. (#70199) Thanks @hanamizuki.

changes.title: Discord: make auto-thread parent transcript inheritance opt-在 via `channels.Discord.thread.inheritParent`, keeping newly created Discord thread sessions isolated 通过 default while preserving explicit inheritance 为了 configured accounts. 修复 #69907. (#69986) Thanks @Blahdude.
changes.rawTitle: Discord: make auto-thread parent transcript inheritance opt-in via `channels.discord.thread.inheritParent`, keeping newly created Discord thread sessions isolated by default while preserving explicit inheritance for configured accounts. Fixes #69907. (#69986) Thanks @Blahdude.

changes.title: 浏览器/Chrome MCP协议: reset cached existing-session control sessions 当 a `navigate_page` call times out, so one stuck navigation no longer poisons the 浏览器 profile until a 网关 restart. (#69733) Thanks @ayeshakhalid192007-dev.
changes.rawTitle: Browser/Chrome MCP: reset cached existing-session control sessions when a `navigate_page` call times out, so one stuck navigation no longer poisons the browser profile until a gateway restart. (#69733) Thanks @ayeshakhalid192007-dev.

changes.title: 浏览器/Chrome MCP协议: propagate click timeouts 和 abort signals to existing-session actions so a stuck click fails fast 和 reconnects 而不是 poisoning the 浏览器 工具 until 网关 restart. (#63524) Thanks @dongseok0.
changes.rawTitle: Browser/Chrome MCP: propagate click timeouts and abort signals to existing-session actions so a stuck click fails fast and reconnects instead of poisoning the browser tool until gateway restart. (#63524) Thanks @dongseok0.

changes.title: Amazon Bedrock/prompt caching: 解决 opaque application inference profile targets 之前 injecting Bedrock cache points, require every routed target to 支持 explicit cache points, 和 重试 transient profile lookups 而不是 caching a false negative 为了 the rest 的 the process. (#69953) Thanks @anirudhmarc 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Amazon Bedrock/prompt caching: resolve opaque application inference profile targets before injecting Bedrock cache points, require every routed target to support explicit cache points, and retry transient profile lookups instead of caching a false negative for the rest of the process. (#69953) Thanks @anirudhmarc and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 网关/channel health: base stale-socket recovery 在 provider-proven transport activity 而不是 inbound app-event freshness, preventing quiet Slack, Discord, Telegram, Matrix, 和 local-style channels 从 being restarted solely because no user traffic arrived. (#69833) Thanks @bek91.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/channel health: base stale-socket recovery on provider-proven transport activity instead of inbound app-event freshness, preventing quiet Slack, Discord, Telegram, Matrix, and local-style channels from being restarted solely because no user traffic arrived. (#69833) Thanks @bek91.

changes.title: OpenCode Go: canonicalize stale bundled `opencode-go` base URLs 从 `/go` 或 `/go/v1` to `/zen/go` 或 `/zen/go/v1`, so older generated 模型 metadata stops hitting the 404 HTML endpoint. (#69898)
changes.rawTitle: OpenCode Go: canonicalize stale bundled `opencode-go` base URLs from `/go` or `/go/v1` to `/zen/go` or `/zen/go/v1`, so older generated model metadata stops hitting the 404 HTML endpoint. (#69898)

changes.title: CLI/channels: honor `channels.<id>.enabled=false` as a hard read-only presence opt-out, so env vars, manifest env vars, 或 stale persisted 认证 state no longer make disabled channel 插件 appear 在 status, 诊断工具, 或 setup-only discovery.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/channels: honor `channels.<id>.enabled=false` as a hard read-only presence opt-out, so env vars, manifest env vars, or stale persisted auth state no longer make disabled channel plugins appear in status, doctor, or setup-only discovery.

changes.title: Channels/preview streaming: centralize draft-preview finalization so Slack, Discord, Mattermost, 和 Matrix no longer flush temporary preview messages 为了 media/错误 finals, 和 保留 first-reply threading 为了 normal fallback delivery.
changes.rawTitle: Channels/preview streaming: centralize draft-preview finalization so Slack, Discord, Mattermost, and Matrix no longer flush temporary preview messages for media/error finals, and preserve first-reply threading for normal fallback delivery.

changes.title: Discord: keep slash 命令 follow-up chunks ephemeral 当 the 命令 is configured 为了 ephemeral replies, so long `/status` output no longer leaks fallback 模型 或 runtime details 进入 the public channel. (#69869) thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: Discord: keep slash command follow-up chunks ephemeral when the command is configured for ephemeral replies, so long `/status` output no longer leaks fallback model or runtime details into the public channel. (#69869) thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: 网关/session history: re-check current 认证 和 `chat.history` scope 之前 later SSE keepalives 和 transcript updates, so active session-history streams close 之前 delivering post-revocation events.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/session history: re-check current auth and `chat.history` scope before later SSE keepalives and transcript updates, so active session-history streams close before delivering post-revocation events.

changes.title: 插件/discovery: reject package 插件 source entries that escape the package directory 之前 explicit runtime entries 或 inferred built JavaScript peers can be used. (#69868) thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/discovery: reject package plugin source entries that escape the package directory before explicit runtime entries or inferred built JavaScript peers can be used. (#69868) thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: CLI/channels: 解决 channel presence through a shared policy that keeps ambient env vars 和 stale persisted 认证 从 surfacing disabled bundled 插件 在 status, 诊断工具, 安全 audit, 和 cron delivery validation unless the channel 或 插件 is effectively enabled 或 explicitly configured. (#69862) Thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/channels: resolve channel presence through a shared policy that keeps ambient env vars and stale persisted auth from surfacing disabled bundled plugins in status, doctor, security audit, and cron delivery validation unless the channel or plugin is effectively enabled or explicitly configured. (#69862) Thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: 诊断工具/插件: hydrate legacy partial interactive handler state 之前 插件 reload clears dedupe caches, so `openclaw 诊断工具` 和 post-更新 诊断工具 runs no longer 崩溃 使用 `Cannot read properties 的 undefined (reading 'clear')`. (#70135) Thanks @ngutman.
changes.rawTitle: Doctor/plugins: hydrate legacy partial interactive handler state before plugin reload clears dedupe caches, so `openclaw doctor` and post-update doctor runs no longer crash with `Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'clear')`. (#70135) Thanks @ngutman.

changes.title: Control 界面/配置: 保留 intentionally empty raw 配置 snapshots 当 clearing pending updates so reset restores the original bytes 而不是 synthesizing JSON 为了 blank 配置 files. (#68178) Thanks @BunsDev.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/config: preserve intentionally empty raw config snapshots when clearing pending updates so reset restores the original bytes instead of synthesizing JSON for blank config files. (#68178) Thanks @BunsDev.

changes.title: 内存-core/dreaming: surface a `Dreaming status: blocked` line 在 `openclaw 内存 status` 当 dreaming is enabled 但是 the heartbeat that drives the managed cron is not firing 为了 the default Agent, 和 添加 a Troubleshooting section to the dreaming docs covering the two common causes (per-Agent `heartbeat` blocks excluding `main`, 和 `heartbeat.every` set to `0`/empty/invalid), so the silent failure described 在 #69843 becomes legible 在 the status surface.
changes.rawTitle: memory-core/dreaming: surface a `Dreaming status: blocked` line in `openclaw memory status` when dreaming is enabled but the heartbeat that drives the managed cron is not firing for the default agent, and add a Troubleshooting section to the dreaming docs covering the two common causes (per-agent `heartbeat` blocks excluding `main`, and `heartbeat.every` set to `0`/empty/invalid), so the silent failure described in #69843 becomes legible on the status surface.

changes.title: 模型/CLI: show bundled provider-owned static catalog rows 在 `模型 list --all` 之前 认证 is configured, including Kimi K2.6 rows 为了 Moonshot, OpenRouter, 和 Vercel AI 网关, while keeping local-only 和 workspace 插件 catalog paths isolated. (#69909) Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.rawTitle: Telegram: require the same `/models` authorization for group model-picker callbacks, so unauthorized participants can no longer browse or change the session model through inline buttons. (#70235) Thanks @drobison00.

changes.title: Agent/Pi: honor explicit `strict-agentic` execution contracts 为了 incomplete-turn 重试 guards across providers, so manually opted-在 local 或 compatible 模型 get the same 重试 behavior 不适用 relying 在 OpenAI 模型 inference. (#66750) Thanks @ziomancer.

changes.title: OpenShell/sandbox: pin verified file reads to an already-opened descriptor, walk the ancestor chain 为了 symlinked parents 在 platforms 不适用 fd-路径 readlink, 和 re-check file identity so parent symlink swaps cannot redirect 在-sandbox reads to host files outside the allowed mount root. (#69798) Thanks @drobison00.
changes.rawTitle: OpenShell/sandbox: pin verified file reads to an already-opened descriptor, walk the ancestor chain for symlinked parents on platforms without fd-path readlink, and re-check file identity so parent symlink swaps cannot redirect in-sandbox reads to host files outside the allowed mount root. (#69798) Thanks @drobison00.

changes.rawTitle: Gateway/restart: default session-scoped restart sentinels to a one-shot agent continuation, so chat-initiated Gateway restarts acknowledge successful boot automatically. (#70269) Thanks @obviyus.

items.rawTitle: Plugins/install: keep bundled plugin dependencies off npm install while repairing them when plugins activate from a packaged install, including Feishu/Lark, Browser, and direct bundled channel setup-entry loads.

items.title: 网关/pairing: shared-secret loopback CLI clients 现在 静默地 auto-approve `metadata-upgrade` pairing (platform / device family refresh) 而不是 being disconnected 使用 `1008 pairing required`. This matches the scope-upgrade 和 role-upgrade behavior added 在 #69431 和 unblocks non-interactive CLI automation 当 a paired-device record has a stale platform string (e.g. device 密钥 replicated across hosts, install migrated 之间 OSes, 或 platform-string format changed 之间 OpenClaw versions). 浏览器 / Control-界面 clients keep the existing approval-required flow 为了 metadata changes.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/pairing: shared-secret loopback CLI clients now silently auto-approve `metadata-upgrade` pairing (platform / device family refresh) instead of being disconnected with `1008 pairing required`. This matches the scope-upgrade and role-upgrade behavior added in #69431 and unblocks non-interactive CLI automation when a paired-device record has a stale platform string (e.g. device key replicated across hosts, install migrated between OSes, or platform-string format changed between OpenClaw versions). Browser / Control-UI clients keep the existing approval-required flow for metadata changes.

items.title: 浏览器/Chrome MCP协议: reset cached existing-session control sessions 当 a `navigate_page` call times out, so one stuck navigation no longer poisons the 浏览器 profile until a 网关 restart. (#69733) Thanks @ayeshakhalid192007-dev.
items.rawTitle: Browser/Chrome MCP: reset cached existing-session control sessions when a `navigate_page` call times out, so one stuck navigation no longer poisons the browser profile until a gateway restart. (#69733) Thanks @ayeshakhalid192007-dev.

items.title: 浏览器/Chrome MCP协议: propagate click timeouts 和 abort signals to existing-session actions so a stuck click fails fast 和 reconnects 而不是 poisoning the 浏览器 工具 until 网关 restart. (#63524) Thanks @dongseok0.
items.rawTitle: Browser/Chrome MCP: propagate click timeouts and abort signals to existing-session actions so a stuck click fails fast and reconnects instead of poisoning the browser tool until gateway restart. (#63524) Thanks @dongseok0.

items.title: OpenAI Codex: 添加 a ChatGPT device-code 认证 选项 beside 浏览器 OAuth认证, so headless 或 callback-hostile setups can sign 在 不适用 relying 在 the localhost 浏览器 callback. (#69557) Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: OpenAI Codex: add a ChatGPT device-code auth option beside browser OAuth, so headless or callback-hostile setups can sign in without relying on the localhost browser callback. (#69557) Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: 网关/diagnostics: 启用 payload-free stability recording 通过 default 和 添加 a 支持-ready diagnostics export 使用 sanitized logs, status, health, 配置, 和 stability snapshots 为了 bug reports. (#70324) Thanks @gumadeiras.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/diagnostics: enable payload-free stability recording by default and add a support-ready diagnostics export with sanitized logs, status, health, config, and stability snapshots for bug reports. (#70324) Thanks @gumadeiras.

items.title: CLI/Claude: default `claude-CLI` runs to warm stdio sessions, including custom configs that omit transport fields, 和 resume 从 the stored Claude session 之后 网关 restarts 或 idle exits. (#69679) Thanks @obviyus.
items.rawTitle: CLI/Claude: default `claude-cli` runs to warm stdio sessions, including custom configs that omit transport fields, and resume from the stored Claude session after Gateway restarts or idle exits. (#69679) Thanks @obviyus.

items.title: Status: show `Fast` 在 `/status` 当 fast mode is enabled, including 配置/default-derived fast mode, 和 omit it 当 disabled.
items.rawTitle: Status: show `Fast` in `/status` when fast mode is enabled, including config/default-derived fast mode, and omit it when disabled.

items.title: 配置/网关: restore last-known-good 配置 在 critical clobber signatures such as missing metadata, missing `网关.mode`, 或 sharp size drops, preventing 网关 崩溃 loops 当 a valid backup exists. 修复 #70336.
items.rawTitle: Config/gateway: restore last-known-good config on critical clobber signatures such as missing metadata, missing `gateway.mode`, or sharp size drops, preventing gateway crash loops when a valid backup exists. Fixes #70336.

items.title: 配置: render validation warnings 使用 real line breaks 而不是 a literal `\n` sequence 在 CLI/audit output. 修复 #70140.
items.rawTitle: Config: render validation warnings with real line breaks instead of a literal `\n` sequence in CLI/audit output. Fixes #70140.

items.title: 网关/pairing: treat any forwarded-header evidence (`Forwarded`, `X-Forwarded-*`, 或 `X-Real-IP`) as proxied WebSocket traffic 之前 pairing locality checks, so reverse-代理 topologies cannot use the loopback shared-secret helper auto-pairing 路径.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/pairing: treat any forwarded-header evidence (`Forwarded`, `X-Forwarded-*`, or `X-Real-IP`) as proxied WebSocket traffic before pairing locality checks, so reverse-proxy topologies cannot use the loopback shared-secret helper auto-pairing path.

items.title: 网关/pairing webchat: render `/pair qr` replies as structured media 而不是 raw markdown text, 保留 inline reply threading 和 silent-control handling 在 media replies, 避免 persisting sensitive QR images 进入 transcript history, 和 keep local webchat media embedding behind internal-only trust markers. (#70047) Thanks @BunsDev.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/pairing webchat: render `/pair qr` replies as structured media instead of raw markdown text, preserve inline reply threading and silent-control handling on media replies, avoid persisting sensitive QR images into transcript history, and keep local webchat media embedding behind internal-only trust markers. (#70047) Thanks @BunsDev.

items.title: 网关/session history: re-check current 认证 和 `chat.history` scope 之前 later SSE keepalives 和 transcript updates, so active session-history streams close 之前 delivering post-revocation events.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/session history: re-check current auth and `chat.history` scope before later SSE keepalives and transcript updates, so active session-history streams close before delivering post-revocation events.

items.title: Control 界面/配置: 保留 intentionally empty raw 配置 snapshots 当 clearing pending updates so reset restores the original bytes 而不是 synthesizing JSON 为了 blank 配置 files. (#68178) Thanks @BunsDev.
items.rawTitle: Control UI/config: preserve intentionally empty raw config snapshots when clearing pending updates so reset restores the original bytes instead of synthesizing JSON for blank config files. (#68178) Thanks @BunsDev.

items.title: Configure: skip generic CLI startup bootstrap 为了 `openclaw configure` 和 bound hint-only 网关 probes so the onboarding TUI reaches its first prompt faster 当 the 网关 is unavailable. (#69984) Thanks @obviyus.
items.rawTitle: Configure: skip generic CLI startup bootstrap for `openclaw configure` and bound hint-only gateway probes so the onboarding TUI reaches its first prompt faster when the Gateway is unavailable. (#69984) Thanks @obviyus.

items.rawTitle: QQBot: add `INTERACTION` intent (`1 << 26`) to the gateway constants and include it in the `FULL_INTENTS` mask so interaction events are received. (#70143) Thanks @cxyhhhhh.

items.rawTitle: Security/dotenv: block workspace `.env` overrides for Matrix, Mattermost, IRC, and Synology endpoint settings so cloned workspaces cannot redirect bundled connector traffic through local endpoint config. (#70240) Thanks @drobison00.

items.rawTitle: CLI/debugging: add an opt-in temporary debug timing helper for local CLI performance investigations, with readable stderr output, JSONL capture, and docs for removing probes before landing fixes. (#70469) Thanks @shakkernerd.

items.title: Docs/i18n: 添加 Thai translation 支持 为了 the docs site.

items.title: Auto-reply/media: share one run-scoped reply media context 之间 streamed block delivery 和 final payload filtering, so a local `MEDIA:` attachment is staged once 和 duplicate media sends are suppressed reliably. (#68111) Thanks @ayeshakhalid192007-dev.
items.rawTitle: Auto-reply/media: share one run-scoped reply media context between streamed block delivery and final payload filtering, so a local `MEDIA:` attachment is staged once and duplicate media sends are suppressed reliably. (#68111) Thanks @ayeshakhalid192007-dev.

items.title: Agent/sessions: keep daily reset 和 idle-maintenance bookkeeping 从 bumping session activity 或 pruning freshly active routes, so active conversations no longer look newer 或 disappear 为了 maintenance-only updates.
items.rawTitle: Agents/sessions: keep daily reset and idle-maintenance bookkeeping from bumping session activity or pruning freshly active routes, so active conversations no longer look newer or disappear for maintenance-only updates.

items.title: Agent/BTW: route `/btw` side questions through provider stream registration 使用 the session workspace, so Ollama provider URL construction 和 workspace-scoped hooks apply 正确地. 修复 #68336. (#70413) Thanks @suboss87.
items.rawTitle: Agents/BTW: route `/btw` side questions through provider stream registration with the session workspace, so Ollama provider URL construction and workspace-scoped hooks apply correctly. Fixes #68336. (#70413) Thanks @suboss87.

items.title: Agent/TTS: 保留 spoken text 在 TTS 工具 results while defusing reply directives 在 transcript content, so future turns remember 语音 replies 不适用 treating spoken `MEDIA:` 或 语音 tags as delivery metadata. (#68869) Thanks @zqchris.
items.rawTitle: Agents/TTS: preserve spoken text in TTS tool results while defusing reply directives in transcript content, so future turns remember voice replies without treating spoken `MEDIA:` or voice tags as delivery metadata. (#68869) Thanks @zqchris.

items.title: Agent/Pi embedded runs: suppress the "⚠️ Agent couldn't generate a response" warning 当 the assistant already delivered user-visible content through a messaging 工具 和 the turn ended cleanly (`stopReason=停止`). Real failure modes (工具 errors, provider `stopReason=错误`, interrupted 工具 use) still surface the existing "verify 之前 retrying" warning. 修复 #70396. (#70425) Thanks @neeravmakwana.
items.rawTitle: Agents/Pi embedded runs: suppress the "⚠️ Agent couldn't generate a response" warning when the assistant already delivered user-visible content through a messaging tool and the turn ended cleanly (`stopReason=stop`). Real failure modes (tool errors, provider `stopReason=error`, interrupted tool use) still surface the existing "verify before retrying" warning. Fixes #70396. (#70425) Thanks @neeravmakwana.

items.title: Agent/Pi 认证: 保留 AWS SDK-authenticated Bedrock runs 为了 IMDS 和 task-role setups, clear stale refresh timers 在 sentinel fallback, 和 log unexpected runtime-认证 prep failures 而不是 静默地 leaving the provider unauthenticated. Thanks @wirjo.
items.rawTitle: Agents/Pi auth: preserve AWS SDK-authenticated Bedrock runs for IMDS and task-role setups, clear stale refresh timers on sentinel fallback, and log unexpected runtime-auth prep failures instead of silently leaving the provider unauthenticated. Thanks @wirjo.

items.title: Pi embedded runs: pass real built-在 tools 进入 Pi session creation 和 then narrow active 工具 names 之后 custom 工具 registration, so the runner 和 compaction paths compile cleanly 和 keep OpenClaw-managed custom 工具 allowlists 不适用 feeding string arrays 进入 `createAgentSession`. Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Pi embedded runs: pass real built-in tools into Pi session creation and then narrow active tool names after custom tool registration, so the runner and compaction paths compile cleanly and keep OpenClaw-managed custom tool allowlists without feeding string arrays into `createAgentSession`. Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: 网关/client: keep long-running RPCs such as ACP `Agent.wait` calls 在 charge 的 their own 超时 而不是 closing the websocket 在 a missed app-level tick while work is still pending.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/client: keep long-running RPCs such as ACP `agent.wait` calls in charge of their own timeout instead of closing the websocket on a missed app-level tick while work is still pending.

items.title: 内存-core/dreaming: suppress the startup-only managed dreaming cron unavailable warning 当 the cron service is still attaching, while preserving the runtime warning if cron genuinely remains unavailable. 修复 #69939. (#69941) Thanks @Sanjays2402.
items.rawTitle: Memory-core/dreaming: suppress the startup-only managed dreaming cron unavailable warning when the cron service is still attaching, while preserving the runtime warning if cron genuinely remains unavailable. Fixes #69939. (#69941) Thanks @Sanjays2402.

items.title: 内存-core/dreaming: surface a `Dreaming status: blocked` line 在 `openclaw 内存 status` 当 dreaming is enabled 但是 the heartbeat that drives the managed cron is not firing 为了 the default Agent, 和 添加 a Troubleshooting section to the dreaming docs covering the two common causes (per-Agent `heartbeat` blocks excluding `main`, 和 `heartbeat.every` set to `0`/empty/invalid), so the silent failure described 在 #69843 becomes legible 在 the status surface.
items.rawTitle: memory-core/dreaming: surface a `Dreaming status: blocked` line in `openclaw memory status` when dreaming is enabled but the heartbeat that drives the managed cron is not firing for the default agent, and add a Troubleshooting section to the dreaming docs covering the two common causes (per-agent `heartbeat` blocks excluding `main`, and `heartbeat.every` set to `0`/empty/invalid), so the silent failure described in #69843 becomes legible on the status surface.

items.title: 网关/restart: default session-scoped restart sentinels to a one-shot Agent continuation, so chat-initiated 网关 restarts acknowledge successful boot automatically. (#70269) Thanks @obviyus.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/restart: default session-scoped restart sentinels to a one-shot agent continuation, so chat-initiated Gateway restarts acknowledge successful boot automatically. (#70269) Thanks @obviyus.

items.title: CLI/Claude: verify stored Claude CLI session ids have a readable project transcript 之前 resuming, clearing phantom bindings 使用 `reason=transcript-missing` 而不是 静默地 starting fresh under `--resume`. 修复 #70177.
items.rawTitle: CLI/Claude: verify stored Claude CLI session ids have a readable project transcript before resuming, clearing phantom bindings with `reason=transcript-missing` instead of silently starting fresh under `--resume`. Fixes #70177.

items.title: Pairing: 移除 stale pending requests 为了 a device 当 that paired device is deleted, so an old repair approval cannot recreate the removed device 从 leftover state.
items.rawTitle: Pairing: remove stale pending requests for a device when that paired device is deleted, so an old repair approval cannot recreate the removed device from leftover state.

items.title: OpenShell/sandbox: pin verified file reads to an already-opened descriptor, walk the ancestor chain 为了 symlinked parents 在 platforms 不适用 fd-路径 readlink, 和 re-check file identity so parent symlink swaps cannot redirect 在-sandbox reads to host files outside the allowed mount root. (#69798) Thanks @drobison00.
items.rawTitle: OpenShell/sandbox: pin verified file reads to an already-opened descriptor, walk the ancestor chain for symlinked parents on platforms without fd-path readlink, and re-check file identity so parent symlink swaps cannot redirect in-sandbox reads to host files outside the allowed mount root. (#69798) Thanks @drobison00.
