changes.title: Cron/isolated-Agent: 保留 explicit `delivery.mode: "none"` message targets 为了 isolated runs 不适用 inheriting implicit `last` routing, so Agent-initiated Telegram sends keep their authored destination while bare `mode:none` jobs stay targetless. (#69153) Thanks @obviyus.
changes.rawTitle: Cron/isolated-agent: preserve explicit `delivery.mode: "none"` message targets for isolated runs without inheriting implicit `last` routing, so agent-initiated Telegram sends keep their authored destination while bare `mode:none` jobs stay targetless. (#69153) Thanks @obviyus.

changes.title: Cron/isolated-Agent: keep `delivery.mode: "none"` account-only 或 thread-only configs 从 inheriting a stale implicit recipient, so isolated runs only 解决 message routing 当 the job authored an explicit `to` target. (#69163) Thanks @obviyus.
changes.rawTitle: Cron/isolated-agent: keep `delivery.mode: "none"` account-only or thread-only configs from inheriting a stale implicit recipient, so isolated runs only resolve message routing when the job authored an explicit `to` target. (#69163) Thanks @obviyus.

changes.title: 网关/TUI: 重试 session history while the local 网关 is still finishing startup, so `openclaw tui` reconnects no longer fail 在 transient `chat.history unavailable 期间 网关 startup` errors. (#69164) Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/TUI: retry session history while the local gateway is still finishing startup, so `openclaw tui` reconnects no longer fail on transient `chat.history unavailable during gateway startup` errors. (#69164) Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: BlueBubbles/reactions: fall back to `love` 当 an Agent reacts 使用 an emoji outside the iMessage tapback set (`love`/`like`/`dislike`/`laugh`/`emphasize`/`question`), so wider-vocabulary 模型 reactions like `👀` still produce a visible tapback 而不是 failing the whole reaction request. Configured ack reactions still validate strictly via the new `normalizeBlueBubblesReactionInputStrict` 路径. (#64693) Thanks @zqchris.
changes.rawTitle: BlueBubbles/reactions: fall back to `love` when an agent reacts with an emoji outside the iMessage tapback set (`love`/`like`/`dislike`/`laugh`/`emphasize`/`question`), so wider-vocabulary model reactions like `👀` still produce a visible tapback instead of failing the whole reaction request. Configured ack reactions still validate strictly via the new `normalizeBlueBubblesReactionInputStrict` path. (#64693) Thanks @zqchris.

changes.title: BlueBubbles: prefer iMessage over SMS 当 both chats exist 为了 the same 处理, honor explicit `sms:` targets, 和 never 静默地 downgrade iMessage-available recipients. (#61781) Thanks @rmartin.
changes.rawTitle: BlueBubbles: prefer iMessage over SMS when both chats exist for the same handle, honor explicit `sms:` targets, and never silently downgrade iMessage-available recipients. (#61781) Thanks @rmartin.

items.rawTitle: OpenAI Codex: route ChatGPT/Codex OAuth Responses requests through the `/backend-api/codex` endpoint so `openai-codex/gpt-5.4` no longer hits the removed `/backend-api/responses` alias. (#69336) Thanks @mzogithub.

items.title: 网关/pairing: treat loopback shared-secret node-host, TUI, 和 网关 clients as local 为了 pairing decisions, so trusted local tools no longer reconnect as remote clients 和 fail 使用 `pairing required`. (#69431) Thanks @SARAMALI15792.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/pairing: treat loopback shared-secret node-host, TUI, and gateway clients as local for pairing decisions, so trusted local tools no longer reconnect as remote clients and fail with `pairing required`. (#69431) Thanks @SARAMALI15792.

items.title: Ollama: 添加 provider-policy defaults 为了 `baseUrl` 和 `模型` so implicit local discovery can run 之前 配置 validation rejects a minimal Ollama provider 配置. (#69370) Thanks @PratikRai0101.
items.rawTitle: Ollama: add provider-policy defaults for `baseUrl` and `models` so implicit local discovery can run before config validation rejects a minimal Ollama provider config. (#69370) Thanks @PratikRai0101.

items.title: Agent/模型 selection: clear transient auto-failover session overrides 之前 each turn so recovered primary 模型 are retried immediately 不适用 emitting user-override reset warnings. (#69365) Thanks @hitesh-github99.
items.rawTitle: Agents/model selection: clear transient auto-failover session overrides before each turn so recovered primary models are retried immediately without emitting user-override reset warnings. (#69365) Thanks @hitesh-github99.

items.title: Cron/delivery: treat explicit `delivery.mode: "none"` runs as not requested even if the runner reports `delivered: false`, so no-delivery cron jobs no longer persist false delivery failures 或 errors. (#69285) Thanks @matsuri1987.
items.rawTitle: Cron/delivery: treat explicit `delivery.mode: "none"` runs as not requested even if the runner reports `delivered: false`, so no-delivery cron jobs no longer persist false delivery failures or errors. (#69285) Thanks @matsuri1987.

items.title: Context engine/插件: 停止 rejecting third-party context engines whose `info.id` differs 从 the registered 插件 slot id. The strict-match contract added 在 2026.4.14 broke `lossless-claw` 和 other 插件 whose internal engine id does not equal the slot id they are registered under, producing repeated `info.id must match registered id` lane failures 在 every turn. 修复 #66601. (#66678) Thanks @GodsBoy.
items.rawTitle: Context engine/plugins: stop rejecting third-party context engines whose `info.id` differs from the registered plugin slot id. The strict-match contract added in 2026.4.14 broke `lossless-claw` and other plugins whose internal engine id does not equal the slot id they are registered under, producing repeated `info.id must match registered id` lane failures on every turn. Fixes #66601. (#66678) Thanks @GodsBoy.

items.title: 网关/device pairing: restrict non-admin paired-device sessions (device-令牌 认证) to their own pairing list, approve, 和 reject actions so a paired device cannot enumerate other devices 或 approve/reject pairing requests authored 通过 another device. Admin 和 shared-secret operator sessions retain full visibility. (#69375) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/device pairing: restrict non-admin paired-device sessions (device-token auth) to their own pairing list, approve, and reject actions so a paired device cannot enumerate other devices or approve/reject pairing requests authored by another device. Admin and shared-secret operator sessions retain full visibility. (#69375) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

items.title: 网关/websocket broadcasts: require `operator.read` (或 higher) 为了 chat, Agent, 和 工具-result event frames so pairing-scoped 和 node-role sessions no longer passively receive session chat content, 和 scope-gate unknown broadcast events 通过 default. 插件-defined `插件.*` broadcasts are scoped to operator.write/admin, 和 status/transport events (`heartbeat`, `presence`, `tick`, etc.) remain unrestricted. Per-client sequence numbers 保留 per-connection monotonicity. (#69373) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/websocket broadcasts: require `operator.read` (or higher) for chat, agent, and tool-result event frames so pairing-scoped and node-role sessions no longer passively receive session chat content, and scope-gate unknown broadcast events by default. Plugin-defined `plugin.*` broadcasts are scoped to operator.write/admin, and status/transport events (`heartbeat`, `presence`, `tick`, etc.) remain unrestricted. Per-client sequence numbers preserve per-connection monotonicity. (#69373) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

items.title: Agent/compaction: always reload embedded Pi resources through an explicit loader 和 reapply reserve-令牌 overrides so runs 不适用 extension factories no longer 静默地 lose compaction settings 之前 session start. (#67146) Thanks @ly85206559.
items.rawTitle: Agents/compaction: always reload embedded Pi resources through an explicit loader and reapply reserve-token overrides so runs without extension factories no longer silently lose compaction settings before session start. (#67146) Thanks @ly85206559.

items.title: BlueBubbles: consolidate outbound HTTP through a typed `BlueBubblesClient` that resolves the SSRF policy once at construction so image attachments 停止 getting blocked 在 localhost 和 reactions 停止 getting blocked 在 private-IP BB deployments. 修复 #34749 和 #59722. (#68234) Thanks @omarshahine.
items.rawTitle: BlueBubbles: consolidate outbound HTTP through a typed `BlueBubblesClient` that resolves the SSRF policy once at construction so image attachments stop getting blocked on localhost and reactions stop getting blocked on private-IP BB deployments. Fixes #34749 and #59722. (#68234) Thanks @omarshahine.

items.title: Cron/main-session delivery: 保留 `heartbeat.target="last"` through deferred wake queuing, 网关 wake forwarding, 和 same-target wake coalescing so queued cron replies still return to the last active chat. (#69021) Thanks @obviyus.
items.rawTitle: Cron/main-session delivery: preserve `heartbeat.target="last"` through deferred wake queuing, gateway wake forwarding, and same-target wake coalescing so queued cron replies still return to the last active chat. (#69021) Thanks @obviyus.

items.title: 网关/pairing: return reason-specific `PAIRING_REQUIRED` details, remediation hints, 和 request ids so unapproved-device 和 scope-upgrade failures surface actionable recovery guidance 在 the CLI 和 Control 界面. (#69227) Thanks @obviyus.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/pairing: return reason-specific `PAIRING_REQUIRED` details, remediation hints, and request ids so unapproved-device and scope-upgrade failures surface actionable recovery guidance in the CLI and Control UI. (#69227) Thanks @obviyus.

items.title: GitHub Copilot/onboarding: default GitHub Copilot setup to `claude-opus-4.6` 和 keep the bundled default 模型 list aligned, so new Copilot setups no longer start 在 the older `gpt-4o` default. (#69207) Thanks @obviyus.
items.rawTitle: GitHub Copilot/onboarding: default GitHub Copilot setup to `claude-opus-4.6` and keep the bundled default model list aligned, so new Copilot setups no longer start on the older `gpt-4o` default. (#69207) Thanks @obviyus.

items.title: Sessions/Maintenance: enforce the built-在 entry cap 和 age prune 通过 default, 和 prune oversized stores at load time so accumulated cron/executor session backlogs cannot OOM the 网关 之前 the write 路径 runs. (#69404) Thanks @bobrenze-bot.
items.rawTitle: Sessions/Maintenance: enforce the built-in entry cap and age prune by default, and prune oversized stores at load time so accumulated cron/executor session backlogs cannot OOM the gateway before the write path runs. (#69404) Thanks @bobrenze-bot.

items.title: Exec/YOLO: 停止 rejecting 网关-host exec 在 `安全=full` plus `ask=off` mode via the Python/Node script preflight hardening 路径, so promptless YOLO exec once 重新 runs direct interpreter stdin 和 heredoc forms such as `node <<'NODE' ... NODE`.
items.rawTitle: Exec/YOLO: stop rejecting gateway-host exec in `security=full` plus `ask=off` mode via the Python/Node script preflight hardening path, so promptless YOLO exec once again runs direct interpreter stdin and heredoc forms such as `node <<'NODE' ... NODE`.

items.rawTitle: fix(gateway): enforce allowRequestSessionKey gate on template-rendered mapping sessionKeys. (#69381) Thanks @pgondhi987.

items.rawTitle: Setup/TUI: relaunch the setup hatch TUI in a fresh process while preserving the configured gateway target and auth source, so onboarding recovers terminal state cleanly without exposing gateway secrets on command-line args. (#69524) Thanks @shakkernerd.

items.rawTitle: Gateway/startup: delay HTTP bind until websocket handlers are attached, so immediate post-startup websocket health/connect probes no longer hit the startup race window. (#43392) Thanks @dalefrieswthat.

items.rawTitle: Gateway/Control UI: surface pending scope, role, and device-metadata pairing approvals in auth errors and Control UI hints so broader reconnects no longer look like random auth breakage. (#69226) Thanks @obviyus.

items.rawTitle: Plugins/install: repair active and default-enabled bundled plugin runtime dependencies before import in packaged installs, so bundled Discord, WhatsApp, Slack, Telegram, and provider plugins work without putting their dependency trees in core.

items.title: BlueBubbles: always set `method` explicitly 在 outbound text sends (`"private-API"` 当 available, `"apple-script"` otherwise), 和 prefer Private API 在 macOS 26 even 为了 plain text. 修复 silent delivery failure 在 macOS setups 不适用 Private API where an omitted `method` let BB Server fall back to version-dependent default behavior that 静默地 drops the message (#64480), 和 the AppleScript `-1700` 错误 在 macOS 26 Tahoe plain text sends (#53159). (#69070) Thanks @xqing3.
items.rawTitle: BlueBubbles: always set `method` explicitly on outbound text sends (`"private-api"` when available, `"apple-script"` otherwise), and prefer Private API on macOS 26 even for plain text. (#69070) Thanks @xqing3.

items.title: Cron/isolated-Agent: 保留 explicit `delivery.mode: "none"` message targets 为了 isolated runs 不适用 inheriting implicit `last` routing, so Agent-initiated Telegram sends keep their authored destination while bare `mode:none` jobs stay targetless. (#69153) Thanks @obviyus.
items.rawTitle: Cron/isolated-agent: preserve explicit `delivery.mode: "none"` message targets for isolated runs without inheriting implicit `last` routing, so agent-initiated Telegram sends keep their authored destination while bare `mode:none` jobs stay targetless. (#69153) Thanks @obviyus.

items.title: Cron/isolated-Agent: keep `delivery.mode: "none"` account-only 或 thread-only configs 从 inheriting a stale implicit recipient, so isolated runs only 解决 message routing 当 the job authored an explicit `to` target. (#69163) Thanks @obviyus.
items.rawTitle: Cron/isolated-agent: keep `delivery.mode: "none"` account-only or thread-only configs from inheriting a stale implicit recipient, so isolated runs only resolve message routing when the job authored an explicit `to` target. (#69163) Thanks @obviyus.

items.title: BlueBubbles/reactions: fall back to `love` 当 an Agent reacts 使用 an emoji outside the iMessage tapback set (`love`/`like`/`dislike`/`laugh`/`emphasize`/`question`), so wider-vocabulary 模型 reactions like `👀` still produce a visible tapback 而不是 failing the whole reaction request. Configured ack reactions still validate strictly via the new `normalizeBlueBubblesReactionInputStrict` 路径. (#64693) Thanks @zqchris.
items.rawTitle: BlueBubbles/reactions: fall back to `love` when an agent reacts with an emoji outside the iMessage tapback set (`love`/`like`/`dislike`/`laugh`/`emphasize`/`question`), so wider-vocabulary model reactions like `👀` still produce a visible tapback instead of failing the whole reaction request. Configured ack reactions still validate strictly via the new `normalizeBlueBubblesReactionInputStrict` path. (#64693) Thanks @zqchris.

items.title: BlueBubbles: prefer iMessage over SMS 当 both chats exist 为了 the same 处理, honor explicit `sms:` targets, 和 never 静默地 downgrade iMessage-available recipients. (#61781) Thanks @rmartin.
items.rawTitle: BlueBubbles: prefer iMessage over SMS when both chats exist for the same handle, honor explicit `sms:` targets, and never silently downgrade iMessage-available recipients. (#61781) Thanks @rmartin.

items.title: Telegram/setup: require numeric `allowFrom` user IDs 期间 setup 而不是 offering unsupported `@username` DM resolution, 和 point operators to `从.id`/`getUpdates` 为了 discovery. (#69191) Thanks @obviyus.
items.rawTitle: Telegram/setup: require numeric `allowFrom` user IDs during setup instead of offering unsupported `@username` DM resolution, and point operators to `from.id`/`getUpdates` for discovery. (#69191) Thanks @obviyus.

items.title: Slack: 修复 outbound replies failing 使用 "unresolved SecretRef" 为了 accounts configured via `file` 或 `exec` secret sources; the send 路径 现在 tolerates the runtime snapshot retaining an unresolved channel SecretRef 当 a boot-resolved 令牌 override is already available. (#68954) Thanks @openperf.
items.rawTitle: Slack: fix outbound replies failing with "unresolved SecretRef" for accounts configured via `file` or `exec` secret sources; the send path now tolerates the runtime snapshot retaining an unresolved channel SecretRef when a boot-resolved token override is already available. (#68954) Thanks @openperf.

items.rawTitle: Mattermost: stream thinking, tool activity, and partial reply text into a single draft preview post that finalizes in place when safe. (#47838) thanks @ninjaa.

items.title: Agent/网关 工具: extend the Agent-facing `网关` 工具's 配置 mutation guard so 模型-driven `配置.patch` 和 `配置.apply` cannot rewrite operator-trusted paths (sandbox, 插件 trust, 网关 认证/TLS, hook routing 和 tokens, SSRF policy, MCP协议 servers, workspace filesystem hardening) 和 cannot bypass the guard 通过 editing per-Agent sandbox, tools, 或 embedded-Pi overrides 在 place under `Agent.list[]`. (#69377) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
items.rawTitle: Agents/gateway tool: extend the agent-facing `gateway` tool's config mutation guard so model-driven `config.patch` and `config.apply` cannot rewrite operator-trusted paths (sandbox, plugin trust, gateway auth/TLS, hook routing and tokens, SSRF policy, MCP servers, workspace filesystem hardening) and cannot bypass the guard by editing per-agent sandbox, tools, or embedded-Pi overrides in place under `agents.list[]`. (#69377) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

items.title: 浏览器/user-profile: let existing-session `profile="user"` 工具 calls auto-route to a connected 浏览器 node 或 use explicit `target="node"`, while still honoring explicit `target="host"` pinning. (#48677)
items.rawTitle: Browser/user-profile: let existing-session `profile="user"` tool calls auto-route to a connected browser node or use explicit `target="node"`, while still honoring explicit `target="host"` pinning. (#48677)

items.rawTitle: Active Memory: degrade gracefully when memory recall fails during prompt building, logging a warning and letting the reply continue without memory context instead of failing the whole turn. (#69485) Thanks @Magicray1217.

items.rawTitle: Memory-core/dreaming: normalize sweep timestamps and reuse hashed narrative session keys for fallback cleanup so Dreaming narrative sub-sessions stop leaking. (#67023) Thanks @chiyouYCH.

changes.rawTitle: Telegram/polling: bound the persisted-offset confirmation `getUpdates` probe with a client-side timeout so a zombie socket cannot hang polling recovery before the runner watchdog starts. (#50368) Thanks @boticlaw.

changes.title: Agent/Pi runner: 重试 silent `stopReason=错误` turns 使用 no output 当 no side effects ran, so non-frontier providers that briefly return empty 错误 turns get another chance 而不是 ending the session early. (#68310) Thanks @Chased1k.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/Pi runner: retry silent `stopReason=error` turns with no output when no side effects ran, so non-frontier providers that briefly return empty error turns get another chance instead of ending the session early. (#68310) Thanks @Chased1k.

changes.title: 插件/内存: 保留 the active 内存 capability 当 read-only snapshot 插件 loads run, so status 和 provider discovery paths no longer wipe 内存 public artifacts. (#69219) Thanks @zeroaltitude.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/memory: preserve the active memory capability when read-only snapshot plugin loads run, so status and provider discovery paths no longer wipe memory public artifacts. (#69219) Thanks @zeroaltitude.

changes.title: 插件: keep only the highest-precedence manifest 当 distinct discovered 插件 share an id, so lower-precedence global 或 workspace duplicates no longer load beside bundled 或 配置-selected 插件. (#41626) Thanks @Tortes.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins: keep only the highest-precedence manifest when distinct discovered plugins share an id, so lower-precedence global or workspace duplicates no longer load beside bundled or config-selected plugins. (#41626) Thanks @Tortes.

changes.title: 修复(安全): block MINIMAX_API_HOST workspace env injection 和 移除 env-driven URL routing [AI-assisted]. (#67300) Thanks @pgondhi987.
changes.rawTitle: fix(security): block MINIMAX_API_HOST workspace env injection and remove env-driven URL routing [AI-assisted]. (#67300) Thanks @pgondhi987.

changes.title: Cron/delivery: treat explicit `delivery.mode: "none"` runs as not requested even if the runner reports `delivered: false`, so no-delivery cron jobs no longer persist false delivery failures 或 errors. (#69285) Thanks @matsuri1987.
changes.rawTitle: Cron/delivery: treat explicit `delivery.mode: "none"` runs as not requested even if the runner reports `delivered: false`, so no-delivery cron jobs no longer persist false delivery failures or errors. (#69285) Thanks @matsuri1987.

changes.title: 插件/install: repair active 和 default-enabled bundled 插件 runtime dependencies 之前 import 在 packaged installs, so bundled Discord, WhatsApp, Slack, Telegram, 和 provider 插件 work 不适用 putting their dependency trees 在 core.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/install: repair active and default-enabled bundled plugin runtime dependencies before import in packaged installs, so bundled Discord, WhatsApp, Slack, Telegram, and provider plugins work without putting their dependency trees in core.

changes.title: BlueBubbles: raise the outbound `/API/v1/message/text` send 超时 default 从 10s to 30s, 和 添加 a configurable `channels.bluebubbles.sendTimeoutMs` (also per-account) so macOS 26 setups where Private API iMessage sends stall 为了 60+ seconds no longer 静默地 lose messages at the 10s abort. Probes, chat lookups, 和 health checks keep the shorter 10s default. 修复 #67486. (#69193) Thanks @omarshahine.
changes.rawTitle: BlueBubbles: raise the outbound `/api/v1/message/text` send timeout default from 10s to 30s, and add a configurable `channels.bluebubbles.sendTimeoutMs` (also per-account) so macOS 26 setups where Private API iMessage sends stall for 60+ seconds no longer silently lose messages at the 10s abort. Probes, chat lookups, and health checks keep the shorter 10s default. Fixes #67486. (#69193) Thanks @omarshahine.

changes.title: Agent/bootstrap: budget truncation markers against per-file caps, 保留 source content 而不是 静默地 wasting bootstrap bytes, 和 避免 marker-only output 在 tiny-budget truncation cases. (#69114) Thanks @BKF-Gitty.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/bootstrap: budget truncation markers against per-file caps, preserve source content instead of silently wasting bootstrap bytes, and avoid marker-only output in tiny-budget truncation cases. (#69114) Thanks @BKF-Gitty.

changes.title: Context engine/插件: 停止 rejecting third-party context engines whose `info.id` differs 从 the registered 插件 slot id. The strict-match contract added 在 2026.4.14 broke `lossless-claw` 和 other 插件 whose internal engine id does not equal the slot id they are registered under, producing repeated `info.id must match registered id` lane failures 在 every turn. 修复 #66601. (#66678) Thanks @GodsBoy.
changes.rawTitle: Context engine/plugins: stop rejecting third-party context engines whose `info.id` differs from the registered plugin slot id. The strict-match contract added in 2026.4.14 broke `lossless-claw` and other plugins whose internal engine id does not equal the slot id they are registered under, producing repeated `info.id must match registered id` lane failures on every turn. Fixes #66601. (#66678) Thanks @GodsBoy.

changes.title: Agent/compaction: rename embedded Pi compaction lifecycle events to `compaction_start` / `compaction_end` so OpenClaw stays aligned 使用 `pi-coding-Agent` 0.66.1 event naming. (#67713) Thanks @mpz4life.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/compaction: rename embedded Pi compaction lifecycle events to `compaction_start` / `compaction_end` so OpenClaw stays aligned with `pi-coding-agent` 0.66.1 event naming. (#67713) Thanks @mpz4life.

changes.title: 安全/dotenv: block all `OPENCLAW_*` keys 从 untrusted workspace `.env` files so workspace-local env loading fails closed 为了 new runtime-control variables 而不是 静默地 inheriting them. (#473)
changes.rawTitle: Security/dotenv: block all `OPENCLAW_*` keys from untrusted workspace `.env` files so workspace-local env loading fails closed for new runtime-control variables instead of silently inheriting them. (#473)

changes.title: 网关/device pairing: restrict non-admin paired-device sessions (device-令牌 认证) to their own pairing list, approve, 和 reject actions so a paired device cannot enumerate other devices 或 approve/reject pairing requests authored 通过 another device. Admin 和 shared-secret operator sessions retain full visibility. (#69375) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/device pairing: restrict non-admin paired-device sessions (device-token auth) to their own pairing list, approve, and reject actions so a paired device cannot enumerate other devices or approve/reject pairing requests authored by another device. Admin and shared-secret operator sessions retain full visibility. (#69375) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

changes.title: Agent/网关 工具: extend the Agent-facing `网关` 工具's 配置 mutation guard so 模型-driven `配置.patch` 和 `配置.apply` cannot rewrite operator-trusted paths (sandbox, 插件 trust, 网关 认证/TLS, hook routing 和 tokens, SSRF policy, MCP协议 servers, workspace filesystem hardening) 和 cannot bypass the guard 通过 editing per-Agent sandbox, tools, 或 embedded-Pi overrides 在 place under `Agent.list[]`. (#69377) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/gateway tool: extend the agent-facing `gateway` tool's config mutation guard so model-driven `config.patch` and `config.apply` cannot rewrite operator-trusted paths (sandbox, plugin trust, gateway auth/TLS, hook routing and tokens, SSRF policy, MCP servers, workspace filesystem hardening) and cannot bypass the guard by editing per-agent sandbox, tools, or embedded-Pi overrides in place under `agents.list[]`. (#69377) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

changes.title: 网关/websocket broadcasts: require `operator.read` (或 higher) 为了 chat, Agent, 和 工具-result event frames so pairing-scoped 和 node-role sessions no longer passively receive session chat content, 和 scope-gate unknown broadcast events 通过 default. 插件-defined `插件.*` broadcasts are scoped to operator.write/admin, 和 status/transport events (`heartbeat`, `presence`, `tick`, etc.) remain unrestricted. Per-client sequence numbers 保留 per-connection monotonicity. (#69373) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/websocket broadcasts: require `operator.read` (or higher) for chat, agent, and tool-result event frames so pairing-scoped and node-role sessions no longer passively receive session chat content, and scope-gate unknown broadcast events by default. Plugin-defined `plugin.*` broadcasts are scoped to operator.write/admin, and status/transport events (`heartbeat`, `presence`, `tick`, etc.) remain unrestricted. Per-client sequence numbers preserve per-connection monotonicity. (#69373) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

changes.title: Agent/compaction: always reload embedded Pi resources through an explicit loader 和 reapply reserve-令牌 overrides so runs 不适用 extension factories no longer 静默地 lose compaction settings 之前 session start. (#67146) Thanks @ly85206559.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/compaction: always reload embedded Pi resources through an explicit loader and reapply reserve-token overrides so runs without extension factories no longer silently lose compaction settings before session start. (#67146) Thanks @ly85206559.

changes.title: 内存-core/dreaming: normalize sweep timestamps 和 复用 hashed narrative session keys 为了 fallback cleanup so Dreaming narrative sub-sessions 停止 leaking. (#67023) Thanks @chiyouYCH.
changes.rawTitle: Memory-core/dreaming: normalize sweep timestamps and reuse hashed narrative session keys for fallback cleanup so Dreaming narrative sub-sessions stop leaking. (#67023) Thanks @chiyouYCH.

changes.title: 网关/startup: delay HTTP bind until websocket handlers are attached, so immediate post-startup websocket health/connect probes no longer hit the startup race window. (#43392) Thanks @dalefrieswthat.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/startup: delay HTTP bind until websocket handlers are attached, so immediate post-startup websocket health/connect probes no longer hit the startup race window. (#43392) Thanks @dalefrieswthat.

changes.title: Codex/app-server: release the session lane 当 a downstream consumer throws while draining the `turn/completed` notification, so follow-up messages 之后 a Codex 插件 reply 停止 queueing behind a stale lane lock. 修复 #67996. (#69072) Thanks @ayeshakhalid192007-dev.
changes.rawTitle: Codex/app-server: release the session lane when a downstream consumer throws while draining the `turn/completed` notification, so follow-up messages after a Codex plugin reply stop queueing behind a stale lane lock. Fixes #67996. (#69072) Thanks @ayeshakhalid192007-dev.

changes.title: Codex/app-server: default approval handling to `在-request` so Codex harness sessions do not start 使用 overly permissive 工具 approvals. (#68721) Thanks @Lucenx9.
changes.rawTitle: Codex/app-server: default approval handling to `on-request` so Codex harness sessions do not start with overly permissive tool approvals. (#68721) Thanks @Lucenx9.

changes.title: Cron/delivery: keep isolated cron chat delivery tools available, 解决 `channel: "last"` targets 从 the 网关, show delivery previews 在 `cron list/show`, 和 避免 duplicate fallback sends 之后 direct message-工具 delivery. (#69587) Thanks @obviyus.
changes.rawTitle: Cron/delivery: keep isolated cron chat delivery tools available, resolve `channel: "last"` targets from the gateway, show delivery previews in `cron list/show`, and avoid duplicate fallback sends after direct message-tool delivery. (#69587) Thanks @obviyus.

changes.title: Cron/Telegram: 密钥 isolated direct-delivery dedupe to each cron execution 而不是 the reused session id, so recurring Telegram announce runs no longer report delivered while 静默地 skipping later sends. (#69000) Thanks @obviyus.
changes.rawTitle: Cron/Telegram: key isolated direct-delivery dedupe to each cron execution instead of the reused session id, so recurring Telegram announce runs no longer report delivered while silently skipping later sends. (#69000) Thanks @obviyus.

changes.title: 模型/Kimi: default bundled Kimi thinking to off 和 normalize Anthropic-compatible `thinking` payloads so stale session `/think` state no longer 静默地 re-enables reasoning 在 Kimi runs. (#68907) Thanks @frankekn.
changes.rawTitle: Models/Kimi: default bundled Kimi thinking to off and normalize Anthropic-compatible `thinking` payloads so stale session `/think` state no longer silently re-enables reasoning on Kimi runs. (#68907) Thanks @frankekn.

changes.title: Control 界面/cron: keep the runtime-only `last` delivery sentinel 从 being materialized 进入 persisted cron delivery 和 failure-alert channel configs 当 jobs are created 或 edited. (#68829) Thanks @tianhaocui.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/cron: keep the runtime-only `last` delivery sentinel from being materialized into persisted cron delivery and failure-alert channel configs when jobs are created or edited. (#68829) Thanks @tianhaocui.

changes.title: OpenAI/Responses: strip orphaned reasoning blocks 之前 outbound Responses API calls so compacted 或 restored histories no longer fail 在 standalone reasoning items. (#55787) Thanks @suboss87.
changes.rawTitle: OpenAI/Responses: strip orphaned reasoning blocks before outbound Responses API calls so compacted or restored histories no longer fail on standalone reasoning items. (#55787) Thanks @suboss87.

changes.title: Cron/CLI: parse PowerShell-style `--tools` 允许-lists the same way as comma-separated input, so `cron 添加` 和 `cron edit` no longer persist `exec read write` as one combined 工具 entry 在 Windows. (#68858) Thanks @chen-zhang-cs-code.
changes.rawTitle: Cron/CLI: parse PowerShell-style `--tools` allow-lists the same way as comma-separated input, so `cron add` and `cron edit` no longer persist `exec read write` as one combined tool entry on Windows. (#68858) Thanks @chen-zhang-cs-code.

changes.title: 浏览器/user-profile: let existing-session `profile="user"` 工具 calls auto-route to a connected 浏览器 node 或 use explicit `target="node"`, while still honoring explicit `target="host"` pinning. (#48677)
changes.rawTitle: Browser/user-profile: let existing-session `profile="user"` tool calls auto-route to a connected browser node or use explicit `target="node"`, while still honoring explicit `target="host"` pinning. (#48677)

changes.title: Discord/slash commands: tolerate partial Discord channel metadata 在 slash-命令 和 模型-picker flows so partial channel objects no longer 崩溃 当 channel names, topics, 或 thread parent metadata are unavailable. (#68953) Thanks @dutifulbob.
changes.rawTitle: Discord/slash commands: tolerate partial Discord channel metadata in slash-command and model-picker flows so partial channel objects no longer crash when channel names, topics, or thread parent metadata are unavailable. (#68953) Thanks @dutifulbob.

changes.title: BlueBubbles: consolidate outbound HTTP through a typed `BlueBubblesClient` that resolves the SSRF policy once at construction so image attachments 停止 getting blocked 在 localhost 和 reactions 停止 getting blocked 在 private-IP BB deployments. 修复 #34749 和 #59722. (#68234) Thanks @omarshahine.
changes.rawTitle: BlueBubbles: consolidate outbound HTTP through a typed `BlueBubblesClient` that resolves the SSRF policy once at construction so image attachments stop getting blocked on localhost and reactions stop getting blocked on private-IP BB deployments. Fixes #34749 and #59722. (#68234) Thanks @omarshahine.

changes.title: Cron/网关: reject ambiguous announce delivery 配置 at 添加/更新 time so invalid multi-channel 或 target-id provider settings fail early 而不是 persisting broken cron jobs. (#69015) Thanks @obviyus.
changes.rawTitle: Cron/gateway: reject ambiguous announce delivery config at add/update time so invalid multi-channel or target-id provider settings fail early instead of persisting broken cron jobs. (#69015) Thanks @obviyus.

changes.title: Cron/main-session delivery: 保留 `heartbeat.target="last"` through deferred wake queuing, 网关 wake forwarding, 和 same-target wake coalescing so queued cron replies still return to the last active chat. (#69021) Thanks @obviyus.
changes.rawTitle: Cron/main-session delivery: preserve `heartbeat.target="last"` through deferred wake queuing, gateway wake forwarding, and same-target wake coalescing so queued cron replies still return to the last active chat. (#69021) Thanks @obviyus.

changes.title: Cron/网关: ignore disabled channels 当 announce delivery ambiguity is checked, 和 validate main-session delivery patches against the live cron service default Agent so hot-reloaded Agent 配置 does not falsely reject valid updates. (#69040) Thanks @obviyus.
changes.rawTitle: Cron/gateway: ignore disabled channels when announce delivery ambiguity is checked, and validate main-session delivery patches against the live cron service default agent so hot-reloaded agent config does not falsely reject valid updates. (#69040) Thanks @obviyus.

changes.title: Matrix/allowlists: hot-reload `dm.allowFrom` 和 `groupAllowFrom` entries 在 inbound messages while keeping 配置 removals authoritative, so Matrix allowlist changes no longer require a channel restart to 添加 或 revoke a sender. (#68546) Thanks @johnlanni.
changes.rawTitle: Matrix/allowlists: hot-reload `dm.allowFrom` and `groupAllowFrom` entries on inbound messages while keeping config removals authoritative, so Matrix allowlist changes no longer require a channel restart to add or revoke a sender. (#68546) Thanks @johnlanni.

changes.title: BlueBubbles: always set `method` explicitly 在 outbound text sends (`"private-API"` 当 available, `"apple-script"` otherwise), 和 prefer Private API 在 macOS 26 even 为了 plain text. 修复 silent delivery failure 在 macOS setups 不适用 Private API where an omitted `method` let BB Server fall back to version-dependent default behavior that 静默地 drops the message (#64480), 和 the AppleScript `-1700` 错误 在 macOS 26 Tahoe plain text sends (#53159). (#69070) Thanks @xqing3.
changes.rawTitle: BlueBubbles: always set `method` explicitly on outbound text sends (`"private-api"` when available, `"apple-script"` otherwise), and prefer Private API on macOS 26 even for plain text. Fixes silent delivery failure on macOS setups without Private API where an omitted `method` let BB Server fall back to version-dependent default behavior that silently drops the message (#64480), and the AppleScript `-1700` error on macOS 26 Tahoe plain text sends (#53159). (#69070) Thanks @xqing3.

changes.title: Matrix/commands: recognize slash commands that are prefixed 使用 the bot's Matrix mention, so room messages like `@bot:server /new` trigger the 命令 路径 不适用 requiring custom mention regexes. (#68570) Thanks @nightq 和 @johnlanni.
changes.rawTitle: Matrix/commands: recognize slash commands that are prefixed with the bot's Matrix mention, so room messages like `@bot:server /new` trigger the command path without requiring custom mention regexes. (#68570) Thanks @nightq and @johnlanni.

changes.title: 网关/pairing: return reason-specific `PAIRING_REQUIRED` details, remediation hints, 和 request ids so unapproved-device 和 scope-upgrade failures surface actionable recovery guidance 在 the CLI 和 Control 界面. (#69227) Thanks @obviyus.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/pairing: return reason-specific `PAIRING_REQUIRED` details, remediation hints, and request ids so unapproved-device and scope-upgrade failures surface actionable recovery guidance in the CLI and Control UI. (#69227) Thanks @obviyus.

changes.title: Agent/subagents: include requested role 和 runtime timing 在 subagent failure payloads so parent Agent can correlate failed 或 timed-out child work. (#68726) Thanks @BKF-Gitty.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/subagents: include requested role and runtime timing on subagent failure payloads so parent agents can correlate failed or timed-out child work. (#68726) Thanks @BKF-Gitty.

changes.title: 网关/sessions: reject stale Agent-scoped sessions 之后 an Agent is removed 从 配置 while preserving legacy default-Agent main-session aliases. (#65986) Thanks @bittoby.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/sessions: reject stale agent-scoped sessions after an agent is removed from config while preserving legacy default-agent main-session aliases. (#65986) Thanks @bittoby.

changes.title: 诊断工具/网关: surface pending device pairing requests, scope-upgrade approval drift, 和 stale device-令牌 mismatch repair steps so `openclaw 诊断工具 --修复` no longer leaves pairing/认证 setup failures unexplained. (#69210) Thanks @obviyus.
changes.rawTitle: Doctor/gateway: surface pending device pairing requests, scope-upgrade approval drift, and stale device-token mismatch repair steps so `openclaw doctor --fix` no longer leaves pairing/auth setup failures unexplained. (#69210) Thanks @obviyus.

changes.title: Cron/isolated-Agent: 保留 explicit `delivery.mode: "none"` message targets 为了 isolated runs 不适用 inheriting implicit `last` routing, so Agent-initiated Telegram sends keep their authored destination while bare `mode:none` jobs stay targetless. (#69153) Thanks @obviyus.
changes.rawTitle: Cron/isolated-agent: preserve explicit `delivery.mode: "none"` message targets for isolated runs without inheriting implicit `last` routing, so agent-initiated Telegram sends keep their authored destination while bare `mode:none` jobs stay targetless. (#69153) Thanks @obviyus.

changes.title: Cron/isolated-Agent: keep `delivery.mode: "none"` account-only 或 thread-only configs 从 inheriting a stale implicit recipient, so isolated runs only 解决 message routing 当 the job authored an explicit `to` target. (#69163) Thanks @obviyus.
changes.rawTitle: Cron/isolated-agent: keep `delivery.mode: "none"` account-only or thread-only configs from inheriting a stale implicit recipient, so isolated runs only resolve message routing when the job authored an explicit `to` target. (#69163) Thanks @obviyus.

changes.title: 网关/TUI: 重试 session history while the local 网关 is still finishing startup, so `openclaw tui` reconnects no longer fail 在 transient `chat.history unavailable 期间 网关 startup` errors. (#69164) Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/TUI: retry session history while the local gateway is still finishing startup, so `openclaw tui` reconnects no longer fail on transient `chat.history unavailable during gateway startup` errors. (#69164) Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: BlueBubbles/reactions: fall back to `love` 当 an Agent reacts 使用 an emoji outside the iMessage tapback set (`love`/`like`/`dislike`/`laugh`/`emphasize`/`question`), so wider-vocabulary 模型 reactions like `👀` still produce a visible tapback 而不是 failing the whole reaction request. Configured ack reactions still validate strictly via the new `normalizeBlueBubblesReactionInputStrict` 路径. (#64693) Thanks @zqchris.
changes.rawTitle: BlueBubbles/reactions: fall back to `love` when an agent reacts with an emoji outside the iMessage tapback set (`love`/`like`/`dislike`/`laugh`/`emphasize`/`question`), so wider-vocabulary model reactions like `👀` still produce a visible tapback instead of failing the whole reaction request. Configured ack reactions still validate strictly via the new `normalizeBlueBubblesReactionInputStrict` path. (#64693) Thanks @zqchris.

changes.title: BlueBubbles: prefer iMessage over SMS 当 both chats exist 为了 the same 处理, honor explicit `sms:` targets, 和 never 静默地 downgrade iMessage-available recipients. (#61781) Thanks @rmartin.
changes.rawTitle: BlueBubbles: prefer iMessage over SMS when both chats exist for the same handle, honor explicit `sms:` targets, and never silently downgrade iMessage-available recipients. (#61781) Thanks @rmartin.

changes.title: Telegram/setup: require numeric `allowFrom` user IDs 期间 setup 而不是 offering unsupported `@username` DM resolution, 和 point operators to `从.id`/`getUpdates` 为了 discovery. (#69191) Thanks @obviyus.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/setup: require numeric `allowFrom` user IDs during setup instead of offering unsupported `@username` DM resolution, and point operators to `from.id`/`getUpdates` for discovery. (#69191) Thanks @obviyus.

changes.title: GitHub Copilot/onboarding: default GitHub Copilot setup to `claude-opus-4.6` 和 keep the bundled default 模型 list aligned, so new Copilot setups no longer start 在 the older `gpt-4o` default. (#69207) Thanks @obviyus.
changes.rawTitle: GitHub Copilot/onboarding: default GitHub Copilot setup to `claude-opus-4.6` and keep the bundled default model list aligned, so new Copilot setups no longer start on the older `gpt-4o` default. (#69207) Thanks @obviyus.

changes.title: 网关/status: separate reachability, capability, 和 read-probe reporting so connect-only 或 scope-limited sessions no longer look fully healthy, 和 normalize SSH targets entered as `ssh user@host`. (#69215) Thanks @obviyus.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/status: separate reachability, capability, and read-probe reporting so connect-only or scope-limited sessions no longer look fully healthy, and normalize SSH targets entered as `ssh user@host`. (#69215) Thanks @obviyus.

changes.title: Slack: 修复 outbound replies failing 使用 "unresolved SecretRef" 为了 accounts configured via `file` 或 `exec` secret sources; the send 路径 现在 tolerates the runtime snapshot retaining an unresolved channel SecretRef 当 a boot-resolved 令牌 override is already available. (#68954) Thanks @openperf.
changes.rawTitle: Slack: fix outbound replies failing with "unresolved SecretRef" for accounts configured via `file` or `exec` secret sources; the send path now tolerates the runtime snapshot retaining an unresolved channel SecretRef when a boot-resolved token override is already available. (#68954) Thanks @openperf.

changes.title: Control 界面/device pairing: explain scope 和 role approval upgrades 期间 reconnects, 和 show requested versus approved access 在 the Control 界面 和 `openclaw devices` so broader reconnects no longer look like lost pairings. (#69221) Thanks @obviyus.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/device pairing: explain scope and role approval upgrades during reconnects, and show requested versus approved access in the Control UI and `openclaw devices` so broader reconnects no longer look like lost pairings. (#69221) Thanks @obviyus.

changes.title: 网关/Control 界面: surface pending scope, role, 和 device-metadata pairing approvals 在 认证 errors 和 Control 界面 hints so broader reconnects no longer look like random 认证 breakage. (#69226) Thanks @obviyus.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/Control UI: surface pending scope, role, and device-metadata pairing approvals in auth errors and Control UI hints so broader reconnects no longer look like random auth breakage. (#69226) Thanks @obviyus.

items.title: Onboard/wizard: restyle the setup 安全 disclaimer 使用 a single yellow warning banner, section headings 和 bulleted checklists, 和 un-dim the note body so 密钥 guidance is easy to scan; 添加 a loading spinner 期间 the initial 模型 catalog load so the wizard no longer goes blank while it runs; 添加 an "API 密钥" placeholder to provider API 密钥 prompts. (#69553) Thanks @Patrick-Erichsen.
items.rawTitle: Onboard/wizard: restyle the setup security disclaimer with a single yellow warning banner, section headings and bulleted checklists, and un-dim the note body so key guidance is easy to scan; add a loading spinner during the initial model catalog load so the wizard no longer goes blank while it runs; add an "API key" placeholder to provider API key prompts. (#69553) Thanks @Patrick-Erichsen.

items.title: Agent/prompts: strengthen the default system prompt 和 OpenAI GPT-5 overlay 使用 clearer completion bias, live-state checks, weak-result recovery, 和 verification-之前-final guidance.
items.rawTitle: Agents/prompts: strengthen the default system prompt and OpenAI GPT-5 overlay with clearer completion bias, live-state checks, weak-result recovery, and verification-before-final guidance.

items.rawTitle: Moonshot/Kimi: allow `thinking.keep = "all"` on `moonshot/kimi-k2.6`, and strip it for other Moonshot models or requests where pinned `tool_choice` disables thinking. (#68816) Thanks @aniaan.

items.title: OpenAI/Responses: 解决 `/think` levels against each GPT 模型's supported reasoning efforts so `/think off` no longer becomes high reasoning 或 sends unsupported `reasoning.effort: "none"` payloads.
items.rawTitle: OpenAI/Responses: resolve `/think` levels against each GPT model's supported reasoning efforts so `/think off` no longer becomes high reasoning or sends unsupported `reasoning.effort: "none"` payloads.

items.title: Lobster/TaskFlow: 允许 managed approval resumes to use `approvalId` 不适用 a resume 令牌, 和 persist that id 在 approval wait state. (#69559) Thanks @kirkluokun.

items.title: Cron/delivery: treat explicit `delivery.mode: "none"` runs as not requested even if the runner reports `delivered: false`, so no-delivery cron jobs no longer persist false delivery failures 或 errors. (#69285) Thanks @matsuri1987.
items.rawTitle: Cron/delivery: treat explicit `delivery.mode: "none"` runs as not requested even if the runner reports `delivered: false`, so no-delivery cron jobs no longer persist false delivery failures or errors. (#69285) Thanks @matsuri1987.

items.title: Context engine/插件: 停止 rejecting third-party context engines whose `info.id` differs 从 the registered 插件 slot id. The strict-match contract added 在 2026.4.14 broke `lossless-claw` 和 other 插件 whose internal engine id does not equal the slot id they are registered under, producing repeated `info.id must match registered id` lane failures 在 every turn. 修复 #66601. (#66678) Thanks @GodsBoy.
items.rawTitle: Context engine/plugins: stop rejecting third-party context engines whose `info.id` differs from the registered plugin slot id. The strict-match contract added in 2026.4.14 broke `lossless-claw` and other plugins whose internal engine id does not equal the slot id they are registered under, producing repeated `info.id must match registered id` lane failures on every turn. Fixes #66601. (#66678) Thanks @GodsBoy.

items.title: 网关/device pairing: restrict non-admin paired-device sessions (device-令牌 认证) to their own pairing list, approve, 和 reject actions so a paired device cannot enumerate other devices 或 approve/reject pairing requests authored 通过 another device. Admin 和 shared-secret operator sessions retain full visibility. (#69375) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/device pairing: restrict non-admin paired-device sessions (device-token auth) to their own pairing list, approve, and reject actions so a paired device cannot enumerate other devices or approve/reject pairing requests authored by another device. items.title: 网关/websocket broadcasts: require `operator.read` (或 higher) 为了 chat, Agent, 和 工具-result event frames so pairing-scoped 和 node-role sessions no longer passively receive session chat content, 和 scope-gate unknown broadcast events 通过 default. 插件-defined `插件.*` broadcasts are scoped to operator.write/admin, 和 status/transport events (`heartbeat`, `presence`, `tick`, etc.) remain unrestricted. Per-client sequence numbers 保留 per-connection monotonicity. (#69373) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/websocket broadcasts: require `operator.read` (or higher) for chat, agent, and tool-result event frames so pairing-scoped and node-role sessions no longer passively receive session chat content, and scope-gate unknown broadcast events by default. Plugin-defined `plugin.*` broadcasts are scoped to operator.write/admin, and status/transport events (`heartbeat`, `presence`, `tick`, etc.) remain unrestricted. Per-client sequence numbers preserve per-connection monotonicity. (#69373) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

items.title: Agent/compaction: always reload embedded Pi resources through an explicit loader 和 reapply reserve-令牌 overrides so runs 不适用 extension factories no longer 静默地 lose compaction settings 之前 session start. (#67146) Thanks @ly85206559.

(#68234) Thanks @omarshahine.

items.rawTitle: Telegram/polling: bound the persisted-offset confirmation `getUpdates` probe with a client-side timeout so a zombie socket cannot hang polling recovery before the runner watchdog starts. (#50368) Thanks @boticlaw.

items.title: 插件/install: repair active 和 default-enabled bundled 插件 runtime dependencies 之前 import 在 packaged installs, so bundled Discord, WhatsApp, Slack, Telegram, 和 provider 插件 work 不适用 putting their dependency trees 在 core.
items.rawTitle: Plugins/install: repair active and default-enabled bundled plugin runtime dependencies before import in packaged installs, so bundled Discord, WhatsApp, Slack, Telegram, and provider plugins work without putting their dependency trees in core.

items.title: BlueBubbles: raise the outbound `/API/v1/message/text` send 超时 default 从 10s to 30s, 和 添加 a configurable `channels.bluebubbles.sendTimeoutMs` (also per-account) so macOS 26 setups where Private API iMessage sends stall 为了 60+ seconds no longer 静默地 lose messages at the 10s abort. Probes, chat lookups, 和 health checks keep the shorter 10s default. 修复 #67486. (#69193) Thanks @omarshahine.
items.rawTitle: BlueBubbles: raise the outbound `/api/v1/message/text` send timeout default from 10s to 30s, and add a configurable `channels.bluebubbles.sendTimeoutMs` (also per-account) so macOS 26 setups where Private API iMessage sends stall for 60+ seconds no longer silently lose messages at the 10s abort. Probes, chat lookups, and health checks keep the shorter 10s default. Fixes #67486. (#69193) Thanks @omarshahine.

items.title: Codex/app-server: release the session lane 当 a downstream consumer throws while draining the `turn/completed` notification, so follow-up messages 之后 a Codex 插件 reply 停止 queueing behind a stale lane lock. 修复 #67996. (#69072) Thanks @ayeshakhalid192007-dev.
items.rawTitle: Codex/app-server: release the session lane when a downstream consumer throws while draining the `turn/completed` notification, so follow-up messages after a Codex plugin reply stop queueing behind a stale lane lock. Fixes #67996. (#69072) Thanks @ayeshakhalid192007-dev.

items.title: Cron/delivery: keep isolated cron chat delivery tools available, 解决 `channel: "last"` targets 从 the 网关, show delivery previews 在 `cron list/show`, 和 避免 duplicate fallback sends 之后 direct message-工具 delivery. (#69587) Thanks @obviyus.
items.rawTitle: Cron/delivery: keep isolated cron chat delivery tools available, resolve `channel: "last"` targets from the gateway, show delivery previews in `cron list/show`, and avoid duplicate fallback sends after direct message-tool delivery. (#69587) Thanks @obviyus.

items.title: Cron/Telegram: 密钥 isolated direct-delivery dedupe to each cron execution 而不是 the reused session id, so recurring Telegram announce runs no longer report delivered while 静默地 skipping later sends. (#69000) Thanks @obviyus.
items.rawTitle: Cron/Telegram: key isolated direct-delivery dedupe to each cron execution instead of the reused session id, so recurring Telegram announce runs no longer report delivered while silently skipping later sends. (#69000) Thanks @obviyus.

items.title: Control 界面/cron: keep the runtime-only `last` delivery sentinel 从 being materialized 进入 persisted cron delivery 和 failure-alert channel configs 当 jobs are created 或 edited. (#68829) Thanks @tianhaocui.
items.rawTitle: Control UI/cron: keep the runtime-only `last` delivery sentinel from being materialized into persisted cron delivery and failure-alert channel configs when jobs are created or edited. (#68829) Thanks @tianhaocui.

items.title: Discord/slash commands: tolerate partial Discord channel metadata 在 slash-命令 和 模型-picker flows so partial channel objects no longer 崩溃 当 channel names, topics, 或 thread parent metadata are unavailable. (#68953) Thanks @dutifulbob.
items.rawTitle: Discord/slash commands: tolerate partial Discord channel metadata in slash-command and model-picker flows so partial channel objects no longer crash when channel names, topics, or thread parent metadata are unavailable. (#68953) Thanks @dutifulbob.

items.title: Cron/网关: reject ambiguous announce delivery 配置 at 添加/更新 time so invalid multi-channel 或 target-id provider settings fail early 而不是 persisting broken cron jobs. (#69015) Thanks @obviyus.
items.rawTitle: Cron/gateway: reject ambiguous announce delivery config at add/update time so invalid multi-channel or target-id provider settings fail early instead of persisting broken cron jobs. (#69015) Thanks @obviyus.

items.title: Cron/网关: ignore disabled channels 当 announce delivery ambiguity is checked, 和 validate main-session delivery patches against the live cron service default Agent so hot-reloaded Agent 配置 does not falsely reject valid updates. (#69040) Thanks @obviyus.
items.rawTitle: Cron/gateway: ignore disabled channels when announce delivery ambiguity is checked, and validate main-session delivery patches against the live cron service default agent so hot-reloaded agent config does not falsely reject valid updates. (#69040) Thanks @obviyus.

items.title: Matrix/allowlists: hot-reload `dm.allowFrom` 和 `groupAllowFrom` entries 在 inbound messages while keeping 配置 removals authoritative, so Matrix allowlist changes no longer require a channel restart to 添加 或 revoke a sender. (#68546) Thanks @johnlanni.
items.rawTitle: Matrix/allowlists: hot-reload `dm.allowFrom` and `groupAllowFrom` entries on inbound messages while keeping config removals authoritative, so Matrix allowlist changes no longer require a channel restart to add or revoke a sender. (#68546) Thanks @johnlanni.

items.title: BlueBubbles: always set `method` explicitly 在 outbound text sends (`"private-API"` 当 available, `"apple-script"` otherwise), 和 prefer Private API 在 macOS 26 even 为了 plain text. 修复 silent delivery failure 在 macOS setups 不适用 Private API where an omitted `method` let BB Server fall back to version-dependent default behavior that 静默地 drops the message (#64480), 和 the AppleScript `-1700` 错误 在 macOS 26 Tahoe plain text sends (#53159). (#69070) Thanks @xqing3.
items.rawTitle: BlueBubbles: always set `method` explicitly on outbound text sends (`"private-api"` when available, `"apple-script"` otherwise), and prefer Private API on macOS 26 even for plain text. Fixes silent delivery failure on macOS setups without Private API where an omitted `method` let BB Server fall back to version-dependent default behavior that silently drops the message (#64480), and the AppleScript `-1700` error on macOS 26 Tahoe plain text sends (#53159). (#69070) Thanks @xqing3.

items.title: Matrix/commands: recognize slash commands that are prefixed 使用 the bot's Matrix mention, so room messages like `@bot:server /new` trigger the 命令 路径 不适用 requiring custom mention regexes. (#68570) Thanks @nightq 和 @johnlanni.
items.rawTitle: Matrix/commands: recognize slash commands that are prefixed with the bot's Matrix mention, so room messages like `@bot:server /new` trigger the command path without requiring custom mention regexes. (#68570) Thanks @nightq and @johnlanni.

items.title: Cron/isolated-Agent: 保留 explicit `delivery.mode: "none"` message targets 为了 isolated runs 不适用 inheriting implicit `last` routing, so Agent-initiated Telegram sends keep their authored destination while bare `mode:none` jobs stay targetless. (#69153) Thanks @obviyus.
items.rawTitle: Cron/isolated-agent: preserve explicit `delivery.mode: "none"` message targets for isolated runs without inheriting implicit `last` routing, so agent-initiated Telegram sends keep their authored destination while bare `mode:none` jobs stay targetless. (#69153) Thanks @obviyus.

items.title: Cron/isolated-Agent: keep `delivery.mode: "none"` account-only 或 thread-only configs 从 inheriting a stale implicit recipient, so isolated runs only 解决 message routing 当 the job authored an explicit `to` target. (#69163) Thanks @obviyus.
items.rawTitle: Cron/isolated-agent: keep `delivery.mode: "none"` account-only or thread-only configs from inheriting a stale implicit recipient, so isolated runs only resolve message routing when the job authored an explicit `to` target. (#69163) Thanks @obviyus.

items.title: BlueBubbles/reactions: fall back to `love` 当 an Agent reacts 使用 an emoji outside the iMessage tapback set (`love`/`like`/`dislike`/`laugh`/`emphasize`/`question`), so wider-vocabulary 模型 reactions like `👀` still produce a visible tapback 而不是 failing the whole reaction request. Configured ack reactions still validate strictly via the new `normalizeBlueBubblesReactionInputStrict` 路径. (#64693) Thanks @zqchris.
items.rawTitle: BlueBubbles/reactions: fall back to `love` when an agent reacts with an emoji outside the iMessage tapback set (`love`/`like`/`dislike`/`laugh`/`emphasize`/`question`), so wider-vocabulary model reactions like `👀` still produce a visible tapback instead of failing the whole reaction request. Configured ack reactions still validate strictly via the new `normalizeBlueBubblesReactionInputStrict` path. (#64693) Thanks @zqchris.

items.title: BlueBubbles: prefer iMessage over SMS 当 both chats exist 为了 the same 处理, honor explicit `sms:` targets, 和 never 静默地 downgrade iMessage-available recipients. (#61781) Thanks @rmartin.
items.rawTitle: BlueBubbles: prefer iMessage over SMS when both chats exist for the same handle, honor explicit `sms:` targets, and never silently downgrade iMessage-available recipients. (#61781) Thanks @rmartin.

items.title: Telegram/setup: require numeric `allowFrom` user IDs 期间 setup 而不是 offering unsupported `@username` DM resolution, 和 point operators to `从.id`/`getUpdates` 为了 discovery. (#69191) Thanks @obviyus.
items.rawTitle: Telegram/setup: require numeric `allowFrom` user IDs during setup instead of offering unsupported `@username` DM resolution, and point operators to `from.id`/`getUpdates` for discovery. (#69191) Thanks @obviyus.

items.title: Slack: 修复 outbound replies failing 使用 "unresolved SecretRef" 为了 accounts configured via `file` 或 `exec` secret sources; the send 路径 现在 tolerates the runtime snapshot retaining an unresolved channel SecretRef 当 a boot-resolved 令牌 override is already available. (#68954) Thanks @openperf.
items.rawTitle: Slack: fix outbound replies failing with "unresolved SecretRef" for accounts configured via `file` or `exec` secret sources; the send path now tolerates the runtime snapshot retaining an unresolved channel SecretRef when a boot-resolved token override is already available. (#68954) Thanks @openperf.

items.title: Mattermost: stream thinking, 工具 activity, 和 partial reply text 进入 a single draft preview post that finalizes 在 place 当 safe. (#47838) thanks @ninjaa.
items.rawTitle: Mattermost: stream thinking, tool activity, and partial reply text into a single draft preview post that finalizes in place when safe. (#47838) thanks @ninjaa.

items.title: 修复(qqbot): 添加 SSRF guard to direct-upload URL paths 在 uploadC2CMedia 和 uploadGroupMedia [AI-assisted]. (#69595) Thanks @pgondhi987.
items.rawTitle: fix(qqbot): add SSRF guard to direct-upload URL paths in uploadC2CMedia and uploadGroupMedia [AI-assisted]. (#69595) Thanks @pgondhi987.

items.title: 浏览器/Chrome MCP协议: surface `DevToolsActivePort` attach failures as 浏览器-connectivity errors 而不是 a generic "waiting 为了 tabs" 超时, 和 point signed-out fallbacks toward the managed `openclaw` profile.
items.rawTitle: Browser/Chrome MCP: surface `DevToolsActivePort` attach failures as browser-connectivity errors instead of a generic "waiting for tabs" timeout, and point signed-out fallbacks toward the managed `openclaw` profile.

items.title: MCP协议: block interpreter-startup env keys such as `NODE_OPTIONS` 为了 stdio servers while preserving ordinary credential 和 代理 env vars. (#69540) Thanks @drobison00.
items.rawTitle: MCP: block interpreter-startup env keys such as `NODE_OPTIONS` for stdio servers while preserving ordinary credential and proxy env vars. (#69540) Thanks @drobison00.

items.title: Agent/网关 工具: extend the Agent-facing `网关` 工具's 配置 mutation guard so 模型-driven `配置.patch` 和 `配置.apply` cannot rewrite operator-trusted paths (sandbox, 插件 trust, 网关 认证/TLS, hook routing 和 tokens, SSRF policy, MCP协议 servers, workspace filesystem hardening) 和 cannot bypass the guard 通过 editing per-Agent sandbox, tools, 或 embedded-Pi overrides 在 place under `Agent.list[]`. (#69377) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
items.rawTitle: Agents/gateway tool: extend the agent-facing `gateway` tool's config mutation guard so model-driven `config.patch` and `config.apply` cannot rewrite operator-trusted paths (sandbox, plugin trust, gateway auth/TLS, hook routing and tokens, SSRF policy, MCP servers, workspace filesystem hardening) and cannot bypass the guard by editing per-agent sandbox, tools, or embedded-Pi overrides in place under `agents.list[]`. (#69377) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

items.title: 浏览器/user-profile: let existing-session `profile="user"` 工具 calls auto-route to a connected 浏览器 node 或 use explicit `target="node"`, while still honoring explicit `target="host"` pinning. (#48677)
items.rawTitle: Browser/user-profile: let existing-session `profile="user"` tool calls auto-route to a connected browser node or use explicit `target="node"`, while still honoring explicit `target="host"` pinning. (#48677)

items.title: Active 内存: degrade gracefully 当 内存 recall fails 期间 prompt building, logging a warning 和 letting the reply continue 不适用 内存 context 而不是 failing the whole turn. (#69485) Thanks @Magicray1217.
items.rawTitle: Active Memory: degrade gracefully when memory recall fails during prompt building, logging a warning and letting the reply continue without memory context instead of failing the whole turn. (#69485) Thanks @Magicray1217.

items.title: 内存-core/dreaming: normalize sweep timestamps 和 复用 hashed narrative session keys 为了 fallback cleanup so Dreaming narrative sub-sessions 停止 leaking. (#67023) Thanks @chiyouYCH.
items.rawTitle: Memory-core/dreaming: normalize sweep timestamps and reuse hashed narrative session keys for fallback cleanup so Dreaming narrative sub-sessions stop leaking. (#67023) Thanks @chiyouYCH.

items.title: Cron/CLI: parse PowerShell-style `--tools` 允许-lists the same way as comma-separated input, so `cron 添加` 和 `cron edit` no longer persist `exec read write` as one combined 工具 entry 在 Windows. (#68858) Thanks @chen-zhang-cs-code.
items.rawTitle: Cron/CLI: parse PowerShell-style `--tools` allow-lists the same way as comma-separated input, so `cron add` and `cron edit` no longer persist `exec read write` as one combined tool entry on Windows. (#68858) Thanks @chen-zhang-cs-code.

items.title: Control 界面/device pairing: explain scope 和 role approval upgrades 期间 reconnects, 和 show requested versus approved access 在 the Control 界面 和 `openclaw devices` so broader reconnects no longer look like lost pairings. (#69221) Thanks @obviyus.
items.rawTitle: Control UI/device pairing: explain scope and role approval upgrades during reconnects, and show requested versus approved access in the Control UI and `openclaw devices` so broader reconnects no longer look like lost pairings. (#69221) Thanks @obviyus.

changes.title: Agent/OpenAI-completions: always send `stream_options.include_usage` 在 streaming requests, so local 和 custom OpenAI-compatible backends report real context usage 而不是 showing 0%. (#68746) Thanks @kagura-Agent.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/openai-completions: always send `stream_options.include_usage` on streaming requests, so local and custom OpenAI-compatible backends report real context usage instead of showing 0%. (#68746) Thanks @kagura-agent.

changes.title: Agent/nested lanes: scope nested Agent work per target session so a long-running nested run 在 one session no longer head-的-line blocks unrelated sessions across the 网关. (#67785) Thanks @stainlu.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/nested lanes: scope nested agent work per target session so a long-running nested run on one session no longer head-of-line blocks unrelated sessions across the gateway. (#67785) Thanks @stainlu.

changes.title: Agent/status: 保留 carried-forward session 令牌 totals 为了 providers that omit usage metadata, so `/status` 和 `openclaw sessions` keep showing the last known context usage 而不是 dropping back to unknown/0%. (#67695) Thanks @stainlu.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/status: preserve carried-forward session token totals for providers that omit usage metadata, so `/status` and `openclaw sessions` keep showing the last known context usage instead of dropping back to unknown/0%. (#67695) Thanks @stainlu.

changes.rawTitle: Install/update: keep legacy update verification compatible with the QA Lab runtime shim, so updating older global installs to beta no longer fails after npm installs the package successfully.
